sEn: We present an updated benchmark for graph neural networks with a new molecular dataset and demonstrate its utility in exploring positional encoding.
sZh: 我们提出了一个更新的图神经网络基准测试，包含一个新的分子数据集，并展示了其在探索位置编码方面的实用性。
absEn: In the last few years, graph neural networks (GNNs) have become the standard toolkit for analyzing and learning from data on graphs. This emerging field has witnessed an extensive growth of promising techniques that have been applied with success to computer science, mathematics, biology, physics and chemistry. But for any successful field to become mainstream and reliable, benchmarks must be developed to quantify progress. This led us in March 2020 to release a benchmark framework that i) comprises of a diverse collection of mathematical and real-world graphs, ii) enables fair model comparison with the same parameter budget to identify key architectures, iii) has an open-source, easy-to-use and reproducible code infrastructure, and iv) is flexible for researchers to experiment with new theoretical ideas. As of December 2022, the GitHub repository has reached 2,000 stars and 380 forks, which demonstrates the utility of the proposed open-source framework through the wide usage by the GNN community. In this paper, we present an updated version of our benchmark with a concise presentation of the aforementioned framework characteristics, an additional medium-sized molecular dataset AQSOL, similar to the popular ZINC, but with a real-world measured chemical target, and discuss how this framework can be leveraged to explore new GNN designs and insights. As a proof of value of our benchmark, we study the case of graph positional encoding (PE) in GNNs, which was introduced with this benchmark and has since spurred interest of exploring more powerful PE for Transformers and GNNs in a robust experimental setting.
absZh: 在过去几年中，图神经网络（GNN）已成为分析和学习图数据的标准工具。这一新兴领域见证了大量有前景技术的广泛增长，这些技术已成功应用于计算机科学、数学、生物学、物理学和化学。但要使任何成功的领域成为主流并可靠，必须开发基准测试来量化进展。这促使我们在2020年3月发布了一个基准框架，该框架：i）包含多样化的数学和真实世界图集合，ii）在相同参数预算下实现公平模型比较以识别关键架构，iii）具有开源、易用且可复现的代码基础设施，iv）灵活支持研究人员实验新的理论想法。截至2022年12月，GitHub仓库已获得2000颗星和380个分支，这证明了所提出的开源框架通过GNN社区的广泛使用而具有实用性。在本文中，我们介绍了基准测试的更新版本，简洁地展示了上述框架特征，添加了一个类似于流行ZINC的中等规模分子数据集AQSOL，但具有真实世界测量的化学目标，并讨论了如何利用该框架探索新的GNN设计和见解。作为基准测试价值的证明，我们研究了GNN中的图位置编码（PE）案例，该案例随此基准测试引入，并已激发在稳健实验环境中探索更强大PE用于Transformer和GNN的兴趣。

contrib.en: Released an open-source GNN benchmarking framework with diverse datasets, fair comparison protocols, and modular code.

contrib.en: Enabled fair model comparison with fixed parameter budgets of 100k and 500k.
contrib.zh: 通过固定参数预算（10万和50万）实现了公平的模型比较。

contrib.zh: 提供了12个数据集，涵盖来自不同领域的图级、节点级和边级任务。

full.sec: Abstract
full.secZh: 摘要

items.en: In the last few years, graph neural networks (GNNs) have become the standard toolkit for analyzing and learning from data on graphs. This emerging field has witnessed an extensive growth of promising techniques that have been applied with success to computer science, mathematics, biology, physics and chemistry. But for any successful field to become mainstream and reliable, benchmarks must be developed to quantify progress. This led us in March 2020 to release a benchmark framework that i) comprises of a diverse collection of mathematical and real-world graphs, ii) enables fair model comparison with the same parameter budget to identify key architectures, iii) has an open-source, easy-to-use and reproducible code infrastructure, and iv) is flexible for researchers to experiment with new theoretical ideas. As of December 2022, the GitHub repository111The framework is hosted at https://github.com/graphdeeplearning/benchmarking-gnns. has reached 2,000 stars and 380 forks, which demonstrates the utility of the proposed open-source framework through the wide usage by the GNN community. In this paper, we present an updated version of our benchmark with a concise presentation of the aforementioned framework characteristics, an additional medium-sized molecular dataset AQSOL, similar to the popular ZINC, but with a real-world measured chemical target, and discuss how this framework can be leveraged to explore new GNN designs and insights. As a proof of value of our benchmark, we study the case of graph positional encoding (PE) in GNNs, which was introduced with this benchmark and has since spurred interest of exploring more powerful PE for Transformers and GNNs in a robust experimental setting.
items.zh: 在过去几年中，图神经网络（GNN）已成为分析和学习图数据的标准工具包。这一新兴领域见证了大量有前景技术的广泛发展，这些技术已成功应用于计算机科学、数学、生物学、物理学和化学。但要使任何成功的领域成为主流并可靠，必须开发基准来量化进展。这促使我们在2020年3月发布了一个基准框架，该框架：i）包含多样化的数学和真实世界图集合，ii）在相同参数预算下实现公平模型比较以识别关键架构，iii）拥有开源、易用且可复现的代码基础设施，iv）灵活支持研究人员实验新的理论想法。截至2022年12月，GitHub仓库（框架托管于https://github.com/graphdeeplearning/benchmarking-gnns）已获得2000颗星和380个分支，这表明所提出的开源框架通过GNN社区的广泛使用而具有实用性。在本文中，我们介绍了基准的更新版本，简洁地展示了上述框架特征，添加了一个中等规模的分子数据集AQSOL，类似于流行的ZINC，但具有真实世界测量的化学目标，并讨论了如何利用该框架探索新的GNN设计和见解。作为基准价值的证明，我们研究了GNN中的图位置编码（PE）案例，该编码随此基准引入，并自此激发了在稳健实验环境中为Transformer和GNN探索更强大PE的兴趣。

items.en: Keywords: Graph Neural Networks, Benchmarking, Graph Datasets, Exploration Tool
items.zh: 关键词：图神经网络，基准测试，图数据集，探索工具

full.sec: 1 Introduction
full.secZh: 1 引言

items.en: Graph neural networks have benefitted from a great interest recently with numerous methods being developed for diverse domains including chemistry (Duvenaud et al., 2015; Gilmer et al., 2017), physics (Cranmer et al., 2019; Sanchez-Gonzalez et al., 2020), social sciences (Monti et al., 2019), transportation (Derrow-Pinion et al., 2021), knowledge graphs (Schlichtkrull et al., 2018; Chami et al., 2020), recommendation (Monti et al., 2017b; Ying et al., 2018), and neuroscience (Griffa et al., 2017). Developing powerful and expressive GNN architectures is a key concern towards practical applications and real-world adoption of graph machine learning. However, tracking progress is often challenging in the absence of a community-standard benchmark as models that are evaluated on traditionally-used datasets with inconsistent experimental comparisons make it difficult to differentiate complex, simple and graph-agnostic architectures (Hoang and Maehara, 2019; Chen et al., 2019a; Errica et al., 2019).
items.zh: 图神经网络近年来受益于极大的兴趣，针对包括化学（Duvenaud等人，2015；Gilmer等人，2017）、物理（Cranmer等人，2019；Sanchez-Gonzalez等人，2020）、社会科学（Monti等人，2019）、交通（Derrow-Pinion等人，2021）、知识图谱（Schlichtkrull等人，2018；Chami等人，2020）、推荐系统（Monti等人，2017b；Ying等人，2018）和神经科学（Griffa等人，2017）在内的多个领域开发了许多方法。开发强大且富有表现力的GNN架构是图机器学习走向实际应用和现实世界采用的关键问题。然而，在缺乏社区标准基准的情况下，跟踪进展往往具有挑战性，因为模型在传统使用的数据集上评估时，实验比较不一致，难以区分复杂、简单和图无关的架构（Hoang和Maehara，2019；Chen等人，2019a；Errica等人，2019）。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Overview sketch of the proposed GNN benchmarking framework with different modular components. This benchmark is built upon DGL and PyTorch libraries.
items.capZh: 图1：所提出的GNN基准测试框架的概述草图，包含不同的模块化组件。该基准基于DGL和PyTorch库构建。

items.en: We introduce an open-source GNN benchmarking framework (see Fig 1) that brings forward a set of diverse medium-scale datasets which are discriminative to benchmark different GNN models when compared fairly on fixed parameter budgets. The existing collection of datasets, the protocol to use the same parameter budgets for comparison, and the modular coding infrastructure has been widely used to prototype powerful GNN ideas and develop new insights, as shown by 2000+ stars and 380+ forks of the GitHub repository from its first release in March 2020, and 470+ citations gathered by the ArXiv technical report according to Google Scholar. Aspects of the benchmark have led to facilitating several interesting studies for GNNs such as on (i) the aggregation functions and filters (Corso et al., 2020; Tailor et al., 2021; Elhag et al., 2022), (ii) improving expressive power of GNNs (Valsesia et al., 2021; Bouritsas et al., 2022; Bevilacqua et al., 2021), (iii) pooling mechanisms (Mesquita et al., 2020), (iv) graph-specific normalization and regularization (Chen et al., 2022; Zhou et al., 2020; Zhang et al., 2021), and (v) GNNs’ robustness and efficiency (Wei and Hu, 2022; Tailor et al., 2020) among other ideas contributed in the literature. In this paper, we provide an updated overview of the proposed framework that extends on the previous collection of datasets to (a) include a number of essential mathematical datasets which can be used to test specific theoretical graph properties, and (b) incorporate another molecular dataset, AQSOL (Sorkun et al., 2019) that has real-world experimental solubility targets unlike ZINC’s computed targets, resulting in a collection of 12 datasets (see Table 1). The remainder of the paper discusses a proof of concept of the benchmark that can be used to explore and develop new insights for GNNs.
items.zh: 我们引入了一个开源的GNN基准测试框架（见图1），该框架提供了一组多样化的中等规模数据集，这些数据集在固定参数预算下进行公平比较时，能够区分不同的GNN模型。现有的数据集集合、使用相同参数预算进行比较的协议以及模块化编码基础设施已被广泛用于原型化强大的GNN思想并开发新的见解，这从GitHub仓库自2020年3月首次发布以来获得的2000多颗星和380多个分支，以及根据Google Scholar，ArXiv技术报告获得的470多次引用可以看出。该基准的各个方面促进了GNN的几个有趣研究，例如：（i）聚合函数和滤波器（Corso等人，2020；Tailor等人，2021；Elhag等人，2022），（ii）提高GNN的表达能力（Valsesia等人，2021；Bouritsas等人，2022；Bevilacqua等人，2021），（iii）池化机制（Mesquita等人，2020），（iv）图特定的归一化和正则化（Chen等人，2022；Zhou等人，2020；Zhang等人，2021），以及（v）GNN的鲁棒性和效率（Wei和Hu，2022；Tailor等人，2020）等文献中贡献的其他想法。在本文中，我们提供了所提出框架的更新概述，扩展了之前的数据集集合，以（a）包括一些可用于测试特定理论图属性的基本数学数据集，以及（b）纳入另一个分子数据集AQSOL（Sorkun等人，2019），该数据集具有真实世界的实验溶解度目标，不同于ZINC的计算目标，从而形成12个数据集的集合（见表1）。本文的其余部分讨论了基准的概念验证，可用于探索和开发GNN的新见解。

full.sec: 2 Overview of GNN Benchmarking Framework
full.secZh: 2 GNN基准测试框架概述

items.en: Datasets. Collecting representative, realistic and medium-to-large scale graph datasets presents several challenges. It is unclear what theoretical tools can define the quality of a dataset or validate its statistical representativeness for a given task. Similarly, there are several arbitrary choices when preparing graphs, such as node and edge features. Finally, very large graph datasets also present a computational challenge and require extensive GPU resources to be studied (Chiang et al., 2019; Rossi et al., 2020; Hu et al., 2021).
items.zh: 数据集。收集具有代表性、真实且中等至大规模图数据集面临若干挑战。目前尚不清楚哪些理论工具可以定义数据集的质量或验证其对给定任务的统计代表性。同样，在准备图时存在若干任意选择，例如节点和边特征。最后，非常大的图数据集也带来了计算挑战，需要大量GPU资源进行研究（Chiang等人，2019；Rossi等人，2020；Hu等人，2021）。

items.en: On account of such challenges, we present in our benchmark a collection of 12 graph datasets, listed in Table 1, which are (i) collected from real-world sources and generated from mathematical models, (ii) of medium-scale size suitable for academic research, (iii) representative of the three fundamental learning tasks at graph-level, node-level and edge-level, and (iv) from diverse end-application domains. These datasets are appropriate to statistically separate the performance of GNNs on specific graph properties, hence fulfilling the academic mission to identify first principles.
items.zh: 鉴于这些挑战，我们在基准中提供了12个图数据集的集合，列于表1，这些数据集（i）从真实世界来源收集并从数学模型生成，（ii）规模适中，适合学术研究，（iii）代表图级、节点级和边级三个基本学习任务，以及（iv）来自多样化的最终应用领域。这些数据集适合在统计上区分GNN在特定图属性上的性能，从而履行识别第一性原理的学术使命。

items.en: Coding Infrastructure. Our benchmarking infrastructure builds upon PyTorch (Paszke et al., 2019) and DGL (Wang et al., 2019), and has been developed with the following fundamental objectives: (a) Ease-of-use and modularity, enabling new users to experiment and study the building blocks of GNNs; (b) Experimental rigour and fairness for all models being benchmarked; and (c) Being future-proof and comprehensive for tracking the progress of graph ML tasks and new GNNs. At a high level as sketched in Fig 1, our benchmark unifies independent components for: (i) Data pipelines; (ii) GNN layers and models; (iii) Training and evaluation functions; (iv) Network and hyperparameter configurations; and (v) Scripts for reproducibility. This standardized framework has been of immense help to the community as aforementioned about its wide community usage. It has enabled researchers to explore new ideas at any stage of the pipeline without setting up everything else. We direct readers to the README user manual included in our GitHub repository for detailed instructions on using the coding infrastructure.
items.zh: 编码基础设施。我们的基准测试基础设施基于PyTorch（Paszke等人，2019）和DGL（Wang等人，2019），并围绕以下基本目标开发：（a）易用性和模块化，使新用户能够实验和研究GNN的构建块；（b）对所有被基准测试的模型进行实验严谨性和公平性；以及（c）面向未来且全面，用于跟踪图ML任务和新GNN的进展。如图1所示的高层概述，我们的基准统一了以下独立组件：（i）数据管道；（ii）GNN层和模型；（iii）训练和评估函数；（iv）网络和超参数配置；以及（v）用于可复现性的脚本。这个标准化框架对社区帮助巨大，如前所述，其社区使用广泛。它使研究人员能够在管道的任何阶段探索新想法，而无需设置其他所有内容。我们引导读者阅读GitHub仓库中包含的README用户手册，以获取使用编码基础设施的详细说明。

items.en: Parameter Budgets for Fair Comparison. One goal of this benchmark is not to find the optimal hyperparameters for a specific model (which is computationally expensive), but to compare the model and their building blocks within a budget of parameters. Therefore, we decide on using two model parameter budgets: i) 100k for each GNN for all the datasets, and ii) 500k for GNNs where the scalability of a model to larger parameters and deeper layers are investigated. The layers and dimensions are selected accordingly to match these budgets.
items.zh: 用于公平比较的参数预算。本基准的一个目标不是为特定模型找到最优超参数（这计算成本高昂），而是在参数预算内比较模型及其构建块。因此，我们决定使用两种模型参数预算：i）所有数据集的每个GNN为100k，以及ii）当研究模型对更大参数和更深层的可扩展性时，GNN为500k。相应地选择层数和维度以匹配这些预算。

items.en: Discussion on Design Choices. First, our motivation behind the medium-scale datasets in the benchmark is to enable swift yet reliable prototyping of GNN research ideas as we can achieve statistical difference in GNN performance within 12 hours of single experiment runs (see Appendix I). Medium-scale datasets are arguably more informative than small datasets and more feasible than large-scale datasets in the academic-scale research. Second, our coding infrastucture with standard protocols has enabled fair comparison of GNNs something that was lacking in prior literature (Errica et al., 2019). Third, a fixed budget of model parameters for each GNN model allows for fair comparison of different architectures. In the absence of such design choice, it is comparatively difficult to conclude whether a better performing model’s gain arises from its architectural design or extra learning capacity brought by additional model parameters. Finally, the aforementioned decisions can be refined and extended to allow further flexibility as elaborated in Appendix H.
items.zh: 关于设计选择的讨论。首先，我们在基准中使用中等规模数据集的动机是能够快速而可靠地原型化GNN研究想法，因为我们可以在12小时的单次实验运行中实现GNN性能的统计差异（见附录I）。中等规模数据集可以说比小数据集信息更丰富，比大规模数据集在学术规模研究中更可行。其次，我们采用标准协议的编码基础设施实现了GNN的公平比较，这在先前的文献中是缺乏的（Errica等人，2019）。第三，每个GNN模型的固定模型参数预算允许公平比较不同架构。在没有这种设计选择的情况下，相对难以得出结论，即性能更好的模型的增益是来自其架构设计还是额外模型参数带来的额外学习能力。最后，上述决策可以细化和扩展以提供进一步的灵活性，如附录H所述。

full.sec: 3 How can the benchmark be used to explore new insights?
full.secZh: 3 如何利用基准测试探索新见解？

items.en: The proposed benchmarking framework can be used to test new research ideas at the level of data preprocessing, improving the GNN layers and normalization schemes, or even to substantiate the performance of a novel GNN model. Such studies are conveniently facilitated given the set of diverse datasets and the rigorous comparison of different experiments on same parameter budgets. At any stage, a modular component of the framework, such as data, layers, etc., can be modified and multiple experiments on the datasets can be conducted fairly and with ease. Indeed, we employ the framework to perform multiple studies, out of which we present here the insight of positional encodings for GNNs using Laplacian eigenvectors, for an example, while the remainder is included in the appendix.
items.zh: 所提出的基准测试框架可用于在数据预处理、改进GNN层和归一化方案层面测试新的研究想法，甚至用于验证新型GNN模型的性能。鉴于多样化的数据集集合以及在相同参数预算下对不同实验的严格比较，这些研究得以方便地进行。在任何阶段，框架的模块化组件（如数据、层等）都可以修改，并且可以在数据集上公平且轻松地进行多个实验。事实上，我们利用该框架进行了多项研究，在此我们以拉普拉斯特征向量为例展示GNN位置编码的见解，其余内容包含在附录中。

items.en: Graph Positional Encoding. Nodes in a graph do not have any canonical positional information. In the absence of available features, nodes are anonymous, such as the nodes in CSL, CYCLES or GraphTheoryProp datasets in our benchmark. As such, message passing based GCNs perform either poorly or fail completely to detect the class of the graph, such as isomorphic class, or cycles (Murphy et al., 2019; Loukas, 2020). We proposed the use of Laplacian eigenvectors (Belkin and Niyogi, 2003) as node positional encoding by building on top of corresponding dataset files in the data module as shown in the pseudo-code snippet alongside. In other words, the positional encoding pisubscript𝑝𝑖p_{i} for a node i𝑖i can be added to its features xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} as xi=xi+pisubscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑝𝑖x_{i}=x_{i}+p_{i}. Similarly, other ideas can be explored by leveraging respective modules of the framework (in Fig 1) for which we direct to README of our GitHub repository.
items.zh: 图位置编码。图中的节点没有规范的位姿信息。在缺乏可用特征的情况下，节点是匿名的，例如我们基准中CSL、CYCLES或GraphTheoryProp数据集中的节点。因此，基于消息传递的GCN要么表现不佳，要么完全无法检测图的类别，如同构类或环（Murphy等人，2019；Loukas，2020）。我们提出使用拉普拉斯特征向量（Belkin和Niyogi，2003）作为节点位置编码，通过在数据模块中相应的数据集文件基础上构建，如旁边的伪代码片段所示。换句话说，节点i的位置编码p_i可以添加到其特征x_i中，即x_i = x_i + p_i。类似地，可以通过利用框架的相应模块（图1）探索其他想法，我们引导读者参考GitHub仓库的README。

items.en: We used the benchmark to validate and also quantified the improvement provided by this idea. The Laplacian PE effectively improved the MP-GCNs (message-passing based Graph Convolutional Networks) on the the 3 synthetics datasets mentioned previously and other real-world datasets, including the newly added AQSOL dataset. A detailed presentation of the PE with experiments are in Appendix E.1. After the introduction of Laplacian PE through this benchmark, new ideas followed up in the literature for improving PE (Beaini et al., 2021; Wang et al., 2022; Lim et al., 2022; Kreuzer et al., 2021; Ying et al., 2021; Mialon et al., 2021), thus demonstrating how the identification of first principles using the proposed benchmark can steer GNN research.
items.zh: 我们使用基准来验证并量化了这一想法带来的改进。拉普拉斯PE有效改进了MP-GCN（基于消息传递的图卷积网络）在之前提到的三个合成数据集以及其他真实世界数据集（包括新添加的AQSOL数据集）上的性能。关于PE的详细实验介绍见附录E.1。通过此基准引入拉普拉斯PE后，文献中出现了改进PE的新想法（Beaini等人，2021；Wang等人，2022；Lim等人，2022；Kreuzer等人，2021；Ying等人，2021；Mialon等人，2021），从而展示了如何使用所提出的基准识别第一性原理来引导GNN研究。

full.sec: 4 Conclusion
full.secZh: 4 结论

items.en: This paper introduces an open-source benchmarking framework for Graph Neural Networks that is modular, easy-to-use, and can be leveraged to quickly yet robustly test new GNN ideas and explore insights that direct further research. The benchmark led us to propose graph PE that has remained an interesting avenue of exploration since the first release of our benchmark. We also perform additional studies on investigation of different GNN categories, and edge representations for link prediction, the details of which are included in the appendix for interested readers.
items.zh: 本文介绍了一个用于图神经网络的开源基准测试框架，该框架模块化、易于使用，可用于快速而稳健地测试新的GNN想法并探索指导进一步研究的见解。该基准引导我们提出了图PE，自我们基准首次发布以来，这一直是一个有趣的探索方向。我们还进行了关于不同GNN类别和用于链接预测的边表示的其他研究，感兴趣的读者可在附录中找到详细信息。

full.sec: Appendix A Related Work
full.secZh: 附录A 相关工作

items.en: In the last few years, graph neural networks (GNNs) have seen a great surge of interest with promising methods being developed for myriad of domains including chemistry (Duvenaud et al., 2015; Gilmer et al., 2017), physics (Cranmer et al., 2019; Sanchez-Gonzalez et al., 2020), social sciences (Kipf and Welling, 2017; Monti et al., 2019), knowledge graphs (Schlichtkrull et al., 2018; Chami et al., 2020), recommendation (Monti et al., 2017b; Ying et al., 2018), and neuroscience (Griffa et al., 2017). Historically, three classes of GNNs have been developed. The first models (Scarselli et al., 2009; Bruna et al., 2013; Defferrard et al., 2016; Sukhbaatar et al., 2016; Kipf and Welling, 2017; Hamilton et al., 2017) aimed at extending the original convolutional neural networks (LeCun et al., 1995, 1998) to graphs. The second class enhanced the original models with anisotropic operations on graphs (Perona and Malik, 1990), such as attention and gating mechanisms (Battaglia et al., 2016; Marcheggiani and Titov, 2017; Monti et al., 2017a; Veličković et al., 2018; Bresson and Laurent, 2017). The recent third class has introduced GNNs that improve upon theoretical limitations of previous models (Xu et al., 2019; Morris et al., 2019; Maron et al., 2019a; Chen et al., 2019b; Murphy et al., 2019; Srinivasan and Ribeiro, 2020). Specifically, the first two classes can only differentiate simple non-isomorphic graphs and cannot separate automorphic nodes. Developing powerful and theoretically expressive GNN architectures is a key concern towards practical applications and real-world adoption of graph machine learning. However, tracking recent progress has been challenging as most models are evaluated on small datasets such as Cora, Citeseer and TU, which are inappropriate to differentiate complex, simple and graph-agnostic architectures (Hoang and Maehara, 2019; Chen et al., 2019a), and do not have consensus on a unifying experimental setting (Errica et al., 2019; Hu et al., 2020).
items.zh: 在过去几年中，图神经网络（GNN）引起了极大的兴趣，针对包括化学（Duvenaud等人，2015；Gilmer等人，2017）、物理（Cranmer等人，2019；Sanchez-Gonzalez等人，2020）、社会科学（Kipf和Welling，2017；Monti等人，2019）、知识图谱（Schlichtkrull等人，2018；Chami等人，2020）、推荐系统（Monti等人，2017b；Ying等人，2018）和神经科学（Griffa等人，2017）在内的众多领域开发了许多有前景的方法。历史上，已经开发了三类GNN。第一类模型（Scarselli等人，2009；Bruna等人，2013；Defferrard等人，2016；Sukhbaatar等人，2016；Kipf和Welling，2017；Hamilton等人，2017）旨在将原始卷积神经网络（LeCun等人，1995，1998）扩展到图。第二类通过图上的各向异性操作（Perona和Malik，1990）增强了原始模型，例如注意力和门控机制（Battaglia等人，2016；Marcheggiani和Titov，2017；Monti等人，2017a；Veličković等人，2018；Bresson和Laurent，2017）。最近的第三类引入了改进先前模型理论局限性的GNN（Xu等人，2019；Morris等人，2019；Maron等人，2019a；Chen等人，2019b；Murphy等人，2019；Srinivasan和Ribeiro，2020）。具体来说，前两类只能区分简单的非同构图，不能分离自同构节点。开发强大且理论上富有表现力的GNN架构是图机器学习走向实际应用和现实世界采用的关键问题。然而，跟踪最近的进展一直具有挑战性，因为大多数模型是在小数据集（如Cora、Citeseer和TU）上评估的，这些数据集不适合区分复杂、简单和图无关的架构（Hoang和Maehara，2019；Chen等人，2019a），并且在统一的实验设置上没有共识（Errica等人，2019；Hu等人，2020）。

items.en: Consequently, our motivation is to benchmark GNNs to identify and quantify what types of architectures, first principles or mechanisms are universal, generalizable, and scalable when we move to larger and more challenging datasets. Benchmarking provides a strong paradigm to answer these fundamental questions. It has proved to be beneficial for driving progress, identifying essential ideas, and solving domain-specific problems in several areas of science (Weber et al., 2019). Recently, the famous 2012 ImageNet challenge (Deng et al., 2009) has provided a benchmark dataset that has triggered the deep learning revolution (Krizhevsky et al., 2012; Malik, 2017). Nevertheless, designing successful benchmarks is highly challenging as it requires both a coding framework with a rigorous experimental setting for fair comparisons, all while being reproducible, as well as using appropriate datasets that can statistically separate model performance. The lack of benchmarks has been a major issue in GNN literature as the aforementioned requirements have not been rigorously enforced.
items.zh: 因此，我们的动机是对GNN进行基准测试，以识别和量化当我们转向更大、更具挑战性的数据集时，哪些类型的架构、第一性原理或机制是通用的、可泛化的和可扩展的。基准测试为回答这些基本问题提供了一个强有力的范式。它已被证明有助于推动进展、识别基本思想以及解决科学多个领域的特定问题（Weber等人，2019）。最近，著名的2012年ImageNet挑战赛（Deng等人，2009）提供了一个基准数据集，引发了深度学习革命（Krizhevsky等人，2012；Malik，2017）。然而，设计成功的基准极具挑战性，因为它既需要一个具有严格实验设置以实现公平比较且可复现的编码框架，也需要使用能够统计分离模型性能的适当数据集。基准的缺乏一直是GNN文献中的一个主要问题，因为上述要求没有得到严格执行。

full.sec: Appendix B Graph Neural Network Pipeline
full.secZh: 附录B 图神经网络流水线

items.en: In this section, we describe the experimental pipeline for the two broad classes of GNN architectures that are benchmarked in this framework as representative GNN classes – Message Passing Graph Convolutional Networks (MP-GCNs), which are based on the message passing framework formalized in Gilmer et al. (2017), and Weisfeiler Lehman GNNs (WL-GNNs), which improves the theoretical limitations of MP-GCNs and align expressivity power to the WL-tests to distinguish non-isomorphic graphs. The two pipelines are illustrated in Figure 3 for GCNs and Figure 4 for WL-GNNs.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们描述了作为代表性GNN类别在此框架中进行基准测试的两大类GNN架构的实验流程——基于消息传递的图卷积网络（MP-GCN），基于Gilmer等人（2017）形式化的消息传递框架，以及Weisfeiler-Lehman GNN（WL-GNN），它改进了MP-GCN的理论局限性，并将表达能力与WL测试对齐以区分非同构图。图3展示了GCN的两种流程，图4展示了WL-GNN的流程。

items.en: In Section B.1, we describe the components of the setup of the GCN class with vanilla GCN (Kipf and Welling, 2017), GraphSage (Hamilton et al., 2017), MoNet (Monti et al., 2017a), GAT (Veličković et al., 2018), and GatedGCN (Bresson and Laurent, 2017), including the input layers, the GNN layers and the task based MLP classifier layers. We also include the description of GIN (Xu et al., 2019) in this section as this model can be interpreted as a GCN, although it was designed to differentiate non-isomorphic graphs. In Section B.2, we present the GNN layers and the task based MLP classifier layers for the class of WL-GNN models with Ring-GNNs (Chen et al., 2019b) and 3WL-GNNs (Maron et al., 2019a).
items.zh: 在B.1节中，我们描述了GCN类别的设置组件，包括vanilla GCN（Kipf和Welling，2017）、GraphSage（Hamilton等人，2017）、MoNet（Monti等人，2017a）、GAT（Veličković等人，2018）和GatedGCN（Bresson和Laurent，2017），包括输入层、GNN层和基于任务的MLP分类器层。我们还将GIN（Xu等人，2019）的描述包含在本节中，因为该模型可以解释为GCN，尽管它旨在区分非同构图。在B.2节中，我们介绍了WL-GNN模型类别的GNN层和基于任务的MLP分类器层，包括Ring-GNN（Chen等人，2019b）和3WL-GNN（Maron等人，2019a）。

items.capEn: Figure 3: A standard experimental pipeline for GCNs, which embeds the graph node and edge features, performs several GNN layers to compute convolutional features, and finally makes a prediction through a task-specific MLP layer.
items.capZh: 图3：GCN的标准实验流程，该流程嵌入图节点和边特征，执行若干GNN层以计算卷积特征，最后通过任务特定的MLP层进行预测。

items.capEn: Figure 4: A standard experimental pipeline for WL-GNNs, which inputs to a GNN a graph with all node and edge information (if available) represented by a dense tensor, performs several GNN layer computations over the dense tensor, and finally makes a prediction through a task-specific MLP layer.
items.capZh: 图4：WL-GNN的标准实验流程，将包含所有节点和边信息（如有）的图以稠密张量形式输入GNN，在稠密张量上执行若干GNN层计算，最后通过任务特定的MLP层进行预测。

full.sec: B.1 Message-Passing GCNs
full.secZh: B.1 消息传递GCN

items.en: For this class, we consider the widely used message passing-based graph convolutional networks (MP-GCNs), which update node representations from one layer to the other according to the formula: hiℓ+1=f​(hiℓ,{hjℓ}j∈𝒩i)subscriptsuperscriptℎℓ1𝑖𝑓subscriptsuperscriptℎℓ𝑖subscriptsubscriptsuperscriptℎℓ𝑗𝑗subscript𝒩𝑖h^{\ell+1}_{i}=f(h^{\ell}_{i},\{h^{\ell}_{j}\}_{j\in\mathcal{N}_{i}}). Note that the update equation is local, only depending on the neighborhood 𝒩isubscript𝒩𝑖\mathcal{N}_{i} of node i𝑖i, and independent of graph size, making the space/time complexity O​(E)𝑂𝐸O(E) reducing to O​(n)𝑂𝑛O(n) for sparse graphs. Thus, MP-GCNs are highly parallelizable on GPUs and are implemented via sparse matrix multiplications in modern graph machine learning frameworks (Wang et al., 2019; Fey and Lenssen, 2019). MP-GCNs draw parallels to ConvNets for computer vision (LeCun et al., 1998) by considering a convolution operation with shared weights across the graph domain.
items.zh: 对于此类模型，我们考虑广泛使用的基于消息传递的图卷积网络（MP-GCN），其根据公式 hiℓ+1=f(hiℓ,{hjℓ}j∈𝒩i) 逐层更新节点表示。注意更新方程是局部的，仅依赖于节点 i 的邻域 𝒩i，且与图大小无关，使得空间/时间复杂度为 O(E)，对于稀疏图降至 O(n)。因此，MP-GCN在GPU上高度可并行化，并通过现代图机器学习框架中的稀疏矩阵乘法实现（Wang等人，2019；Fey和Lenssen，2019）。MP-GCN与计算机视觉中的ConvNets（LeCun等人，1998）类似，在图域上采用共享权重的卷积操作。

items.en: Each GCN layer computes d𝑑d-dimensional representations for the nodes/edges of the graph through recursive neighborhood diffusion (or message passing), where each graph node gathers features from its neighbors to represent local graph structure. Stacking L𝐿L GCN layers allows the network to build node representations from the L𝐿L-hop neighborhood of each node.

items.en: Let hiℓsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑖ℓh_{i}^{\ell} denote the feature vector at layer ℓℓ\ell associated with node i𝑖i. This guarantees the transformation to build local reception fields, such as in standard ConvNets for computer vision, and be invariant to both graph size and vertex re-indexing.

items.en: The final component of each network is a prediction layer to compute task-dependent outputs, which are given to a loss function to train the network parameters in an end-to-end manner. The input of the prediction layer is the result of the final message-passing GCN layer for each node of the graph (except GIN, which uses features from all intermediate layers).
items.zh: 每个网络的最后一个组件是预测层，用于计算任务相关的输出，这些输出被输入到损失函数中以端到端的方式训练网络参数。预测层的输入是图中每个节点经过最终消息传递GCN层后的结果（GIN除外，它使用所有中间层的特征）。

items.zh: 然后，图特征被传递到一个MLP，该MLP输出每个类别的未归一化logits/分数 ypred∈ℝC：

full.sec: B.2 Weisfeiler-Lehman GNNs
full.secZh: B.2 Weisfeiler-Lehman GNN

items.en: Weisfeiler-Lehman GNNs are the second GNN class we include in our benchmarking framework which are based on the WL test (Weisfeiler and Lehman, 1968). Xu et al. (2019) introduced GIN–Graph Isomorphism Network, a provable 111-WL GNN, which can distinguish two non-isomorphic graphs w.r.t. the 111-WL test. Higher k𝑘k-WL isomorphic tests lead to more discriminative k𝑘k-WL GNNs in (Morris et al., 2019; Maron et al., 2019a). However, k𝑘k-WL GNNs require the use of tensors of rank k𝑘k, which is intractable in practice for k>2𝑘2k>2. As a result, Maron et al. (2019a) proposed a model, namely 333-WL GNNs, that uses rank-2 tensors while being 333-WL provable. This 333-WL model improves the space/time complexities of Morris et al. (2019) from O​(n3)/O​(n4)𝑂superscript𝑛3𝑂superscript𝑛4O(n^{3})/O(n^{4}) to O​(n2)/O​(n3)𝑂superscript𝑛2𝑂superscript𝑛3O(n^{2})/O(n^{3}) respectively. We use 3WLGNNs (Maron et al., 2019a) and RingGNNs (Chen et al., 2019b) as the GNN instances in this class, the experimental pipeline of which are described as follows.
items.zh: Weisfeiler-Lehman GNN是我们基准测试框架中包含的第二类GNN，基于WL测试（Weisfeiler and Lehman, 1968）。Xu等人（2019）提出了GIN——图同构网络，这是一种可证明的1-WL GNN，能够区分关于1-WL测试的两个非同构图。更高的k-WL同构测试在（Morris等人，2019；Maron等人，2019a）中导致了更具判别力的k-WL GNN。然而，k-WL GNN需要使用秩为k的张量，这在k>2时在实践中难以处理。因此，Maron等人（2019a）提出了一种模型，即3-WL GNN，它使用秩为2的张量，同时具有3-WL可证明性。该3-WL模型将Morris等人（2019）的空间/时间复杂度从O(n³)/O(n⁴)分别改进为O(n²)/O(n³)。我们使用3WLGNN（Maron等人，2019a）和RingGNN（Chen等人，2019b）作为该类中的GNN实例，其实验流程如下所述。

full.sec: Appendix C Datasets and Benchmarking Experiments
full.secZh: 附录C 数据集与基准测试实验

items.en: In this section, we provide details on the datasets included in the benchmarking framework (Table 1) and the numerical results of the experiments using the GNN described in Section B, which also consists experiments from a simple graph-agnostic baseline for every dataset that parallelly applies an MLP on each node’s feature vector, independent of other nodes. For complete statistics of the data, see Table 2. The experimental overview in terms of the training strategy, reporting of results and the parameter budget used for fair comparison are described first, as follows.
items.zh: 本节提供基准框架中包含的数据集（表 1）的详细信息，以及使用第 B 节所述 GNN 的实验数值结果，该结果还包括对每个数据集使用简单图无关基线的实验，该基线独立于其他节点，对每个节点的特征向量并行应用 MLP。数据的完整统计信息见表 2。首先描述实验概览，包括训练策略、结果报告以及用于公平比较的参数预算，如下所示。

items.en: Training. We use the Adam optimizer (Kingma and Ba, 2014) with the same learning rate decay strategy for all models. An initial learning rate is selected in {10−2,10−3,10−4}superscript102superscript103superscript104\{10^{-2},10^{-3},10^{-4}\} which is reduced by half if the validation loss does not improve after a fixed number of epochs, in the range 5-25. We do not set a maximum number of epochs – the training is stopped either when the learning rate has reached the small value of 10−6superscript10610^{-6}, or the computational time reaches 12 hours. We run each experiment with 4 different seeds and report the statistics of the 4 results. More details are provided in each experimental sub-sections.
items.zh: 训练。我们对所有模型使用 Adam 优化器（Kingma 和 Ba, 2014）和相同的学习率衰减策略。初始学习率选自 {10−2,10−3,10−4}，如果验证损失在固定 epoch 数（范围 5-25）内没有改善，则学习率减半。我们不设置最大 epoch 数——训练在以下任一条件满足时停止：学习率达到较小值 10−6，或计算时间达到 12 小时。每个实验使用 4 个不同种子运行，并报告 4 个结果的统计信息。每个实验子节提供更多细节。

items.en: Task-based network layer. The node representations generated by the final layer of GCNs, or the dense tensor obtained at the final layer of the higher order WL-GNNs, are passed to a network suffix which is usually a downstream MLP of 3 layers. For GIN, RingGNN, and 3WL-GNN, we follow the original instructions of network suffixes to consider feature outputs from each layer of the network, similar to that of Jumping Knowledge Networks (Xu et al., 2018). Refer to the equations in the Sections B.1.3 and B.2.3 for more details.
items.zh: 基于任务的网络层。GCN 最后一层生成的节点表示，或高阶 WL-GNN 最后一层获得的稠密张量，被传递到网络后缀，该后缀通常是 3 层的下游 MLP。对于 GIN、RingGNN 和 3WL-GNN，我们遵循网络后缀的原始说明，考虑网络每一层的特征输出，类似于 Jumping Knowledge Networks（Xu 等人, 2018）。更多细节请参考第 B.1.3 和 B.2.3 节的方程。

items.en: Parameter budgets. Our goal is not to find the optimal set of hyperparameters for a specific GNN model (which is computationally expensive), but to compare and benchmark the model and/or their building blocks within a budget of parameters. Therefore, we decide on using two parameter budgets: (1) 100k parameters for each GNNs for all the tasks, and (2) 500k parameters for GNNs for which we investigate scaling a model to larger parameters and deeper layers. The number of hidden layers and hidden dimensions are selected accordingly to match these budgets. The configuration details of each single experiment can be found in our modular coding infrastructure on GitHub.
items.zh: 参数预算。我们的目标不是为特定 GNN 模型找到最优超参数集（这计算成本高昂），而是在参数预算内比较和基准测试模型及其构建块。因此，我们决定使用两个参数预算：（1）所有任务中每个 GNN 使用 100k 参数；（2）对于研究模型扩展到更大参数和更深层的 GNN，使用 500k 参数。相应地选择隐藏层数和隐藏维度以匹配这些预算。每个实验的配置细节可在我们的 GitHub 模块化编码基础设施中找到。

full.sec: C.1 Graph Regression with ZINC dataset
full.secZh: C.1 基于ZINC数据集的图回归

items.en: For the ZINC dataset in our benchmark, we use a subset (12K) of ZINC molecular graphs (250K) dataset (Irwin et al., 2012) to regress a molecular property known as the constrained solubility which is the term log​P−SA−cyclelog𝑃SAcycle\text{log}P-\text{SA}-\text{cycle} (octanol-water partition coefficients, log​Plog𝑃\text{log}P, penalized by the synthetic accessibility score, SA, and number of long cycles, cycle). For each molecular graph, the node features are the types of heavy atoms and the edge features are the types of bonds between them. ZINC has been used popularly for research related to molecular graph generation (Jin et al., 2018; Bresson and Laurent, 2019).
items.zh: 对于基准中的 ZINC 数据集，我们使用 ZINC 分子图数据集（250K）（Irwin 等人, 2012）的子集（12K）来回归分子属性，即约束溶解度，表示为 logP−SA−cycle（辛醇-水分配系数 logP，经合成可及性分数 SA 和长环数 cycle 惩罚）。对于每个分子图，节点特征是重原子类型，边特征是它们之间的键类型。ZINC 已被广泛用于分子图生成相关研究（Jin 等人, 2018；Bresson 和 Laurent, 2019）。

items.en: Splitting. ZINC has 10,0001000010,000 train, 1,00010001,000 validation and 1,00010001,000 test graphs. Training. For the learning rate strategy across all GNNs, an initial learning rate is set to 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3}, the reduce factor is 0.50.50.5, and the stopping learning rate is 1×10−51superscript1051\times 10^{-5}. The patience value is 555 for 3WLGNN and RingGNN, and 101010 for all other GNNs. Performance Measure. The performance measure is the mean absolute error (MAE) between the predicted and the groundtruth constrained solubility for each molecular graph. Results. The numerical results are presented in Table 3 and analysed in Section D collectively with other benchmarking results.
items.zh: 划分。ZINC 有 10,000 个训练图、1,000 个验证图和 1,000 个测试图。训练。对于所有 GNN 的学习率策略，初始学习率设为 1×10−3，衰减因子为 0.5，停止学习率为 1×10−5。3WLGNN 和 RingGNN 的耐心值为 5，其他 GNN 为 10。性能度量。性能度量是每个分子图预测约束溶解度与真实约束溶解度之间的平均绝对误差（MAE）。结果。数值结果见表 3，并在第 D 节与其他基准结果一起分析。

full.sec: C.2 Graph Regression with AQSOL dataset
full.secZh: C.2 基于AQSOL数据集的图回归

items.en: AQSOL dataset is based on AqSolDB (Sorkun et al., 2019) which is a standardized database of 9,98299829,982 molecular graphs with their aqueous solubility values, collected from 999 different data sources. The aqueous solubility targets are collected from experimental measurements and standardized to Log​SLog𝑆\text{Log}S units in AqSolDB. We use these final values as the property to regress in the AQSOL dataset which is the resultant collection after we filter out few graphs with no edges (bonds) and a small number of graphs with missing node feature values. Thus, the total molecular graphs are 9,82398239,823. For each molecular graph, the node features are the types of heavy atoms and the edge features are the types of bonds between them.
items.zh: AQSOL 数据集基于 AqSolDB（Sorkun 等人, 2019），这是一个包含 9,982 个分子图及其水溶性值的标准化数据库，数据来自 9 个不同来源。水溶性目标值来自实验测量，并在 AqSolDB 中标准化为 LogS 单位。我们在 AQSOL 数据集中使用这些最终值作为回归属性，该数据集是在过滤掉少数无边（键）图和少量缺失节点特征值的图后得到的。因此，总分子图数为 9,823。对于每个分子图，节点特征是重原子类型，边特征是它们之间的键类型。

items.en: Splitting. We provide a scaffold splitting (Hu et al., 2020) of the dataset in the ratio 8:1:1:81:18:1:1 to have 7,83178317,831 train, 996996996 validation and 996996996 test graphs. Training. For the learning rate strategy across all GNNs, an initial learning rate is set to 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3}, the reduce factor is 0.50.50.5, and the stopping learning rate is 1×10−51superscript1051\times 10^{-5}. The patience value is 555 for 3WLGNN and RingGNN, and 101010 for all other GNNs. Performance Measure. Similar to ZINC, the performance measure is the mean absolute error (MAE) between the predicted and the actual aqueous solubility values. Results. The numerical results are presented in Table 4 and analysed in Section D.
items.zh: 划分。我们提供数据集的骨架划分（Hu 等人, 2020），比例为 8:1:1，得到 7,831 个训练图、996 个验证图和 996 个测试图。训练。对于所有 GNN 的学习率策略，初始学习率设为 1×10−3，衰减因子为 0.5，停止学习率为 1×10−5。3WLGNN 和 RingGNN 的耐心值为 5，其他 GNN 为 10。性能度量。与 ZINC 类似，性能度量是预测水溶性值与实际水溶性值之间的平均绝对误差（MAE）。结果。数值结果见表 4，并在第 D 节分析。

full.sec: C.3 Link Prediction with OGBL-COLLAB dataset
full.secZh: C.3 基于OGBL-COLLAB数据集的链接预测

items.en: OGBL-COLLAB is a link prediction dataset proposed by OGB (Hu et al., 2020) corresponding to a collaboration network between approximately 235K scientists, indexed by Microsoft Academic Graph (Wang et al., 2020). Nodes represent scientists and edges denote collaborations between them. For node features, OGB provides 128-dimensional vectors, obtained by averaging the word embeddings of a scientist’s papers. The year and number of co-authored papers in a given year are concatenated to form edge features. The graph can also be viewed as a dynamic multi-graph, since two nodes may have multiple temporal edges between if they collaborate over multiple years.
items.zh: OGBL-COLLAB 是 OGB（Hu 等人, 2020）提出的链接预测数据集，对应约 235K 科学家之间的合作网络，由 Microsoft Academic Graph（Wang 等人, 2020）索引。节点代表科学家，边表示他们之间的合作。对于节点特征，OGB 提供 128 维向量，通过对科学家论文的词嵌入取平均得到。年份和给定年份的合作论文数量拼接形成边特征。该图也可以视为动态多图，因为两个节点如果在多年间有合作，可能有多条时间边。

items.en: Splitting. We use the realistic training, validation and test edge splits provided by OGB. Specifically, they use collaborations until 2017 as training edges, those in 2018 as validation edges, and those in 2019 as test edges. Training. All GNNs use a consistent learning rate strategy: an initial learning rate is set to 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3}, the reduce factor is 0.50.50.5, the patience value is 101010, and the stopping learning rate is 1×10−51superscript1051\times 10^{-5}. Performance Measure. We use the evaluator provided by OGB, which aims to measure a model’s ability to predict future collaboration relationships given past collaborations. Specifically, they rank each true collaboration among a set of 100,000 randomly-sampled negative collaborations, and count the ratio of positive edges that are ranked at K-place or above (Hits@K, with K = 50). Matrix Factorization Baseline. In addition to GNNs, we report performance for a simple matrix factorization baseline (Hu et al., 2020), which trains 256-dimensional embeddings for each of the 235K nodes. Comparing GNNs to matrix factorization tells us whether models leverage node features in addition to graph structure, as matrix factorization can be thought of as feature-agnostic. Results. The numerical results are presented in Table 5 and discussed in Section D.
items.zh: 划分。我们使用 OGB 提供的现实训练、验证和测试边划分。具体来说，他们使用 2017 年之前的合作作为训练边，2018 年的作为验证边，2019 年的作为测试边。训练。所有 GNN 使用一致的学习率策略：初始学习率设为 1×10−3，衰减因子为 0.5，耐心值为 10，停止学习率为 1×10−5。性能度量。我们使用 OGB 提供的评估器，旨在衡量模型根据过去合作预测未来合作关系的能力。具体来说，他们在 100,000 个随机采样的负合作边中对每个真实合作边进行排序，并计算排名在第 K 位或以上的正边比例（Hits@K，K=50）。矩阵分解基线。除 GNN 外，我们还报告简单矩阵分解基线（Hu 等人, 2020）的性能，该基线为 235K 个节点中的每个节点训练 256 维嵌入。将 GNN 与矩阵分解进行比较可以告诉我们模型是否在利用图结构之外还利用了节点特征，因为矩阵分解可以视为特征无关的。结果。数值结果见表 5，并在第 D 节讨论。

full.sec: C.4 Node Classification with WikiCS dataset
full.secZh: C.4 基于WikiCS数据集的节点分类

items.en: WikiCS is a node classification dataset based on an extracted subset of Wikipedia’s Computer Science articles (Mernyei and Cangea, 2020). It is a single graph dataset with 11,7011170111,701 nodes and 216,123216123216,123 edges where each node corresponds to an article, and each edge corresponds to a hyperlink. Each node belongs to a label out of total 10 classes representing the article’s category. The average of the article text’s pre-trained GloVe word embeddings (Pennington et al., 2014) is assigned as 300-dimensional node features. Compared to previous single-graph node classification benchmarks such as Cora and Citeseer, WikiCS dataset has denser node neighborhoods and each node’s connectivity is spread across nodes from varying class labels. Additionally, as shown in Mernyei and Cangea (2020), the average shortest path length in WikiCS is smaller compared to Cora and Citeseer. Thus, on average, a larger node neighborhood and smaller shortest path length makes WikiCS an appropriate benchmark to test out neighborhood computation functions in GNNs’ design.
items.zh: WikiCS 是一个基于 Wikipedia 计算机科学文章子集的节点分类数据集（Mernyei 和 Cangea, 2020）。它是一个单图数据集，包含 11,701 个节点和 216,123 条边，每个节点对应一篇文章，每条边对应一个超链接。每个节点属于总共 10 个类别中的一个标签，代表文章类别。文章文本的预训练 GloVe 词嵌入（Pennington 等人, 2014）的平均值被分配为 300 维节点特征。与之前的单图节点分类基准（如 Cora 和 Citeseer）相比，WikiCS 数据集具有更密集的节点邻域，且每个节点的连接分布在来自不同类别标签的节点之间。此外，如 Mernyei 和 Cangea（2020）所示，WikiCS 的平均最短路径长度比 Cora 和 Citeseer 更小。因此，平均而言，更大的节点邻域和更小的最短路径长度使 WikiCS 成为测试 GNN 设计中邻域计算函数的合适基准。

items.en: Splitting. We follow the splitting defined in Mernyei and Cangea (2020) that has 20 different training, validation and early stopping splits consisting of 5% nodes, 22.5% nodes and 22.5% nodes of each class respectively. 50% nodes from each class, which are not in the training or validation split, are assigned as test splits. We combine the two original validation (22.5% nodes) and early stopping (22.5% nodes) splits to make the new validation (45% nodes) splits since we do not use separate early stopping splits in our benchmark. Training. As consistent learning rate strategy across GNNs, an initial learning rate is set to 1×10−21superscript1021\times 10^{-2}, the reduce factor is 0.50.50.5, the patience value is 252525, and the stopping learning rate is 1×10−51superscript1051\times 10^{-5}. Since there are 20 different training and validation splits, the training is done 20 times using these splits, and evaluated on the single test split. This is done for 4 times with 4 different seeds. Finally, the average of the 20 ×\times 4 = 80 runs is reported. Performance Measure. The performance measure is the classification accuracy between the predicted and groundtruth label for each node. Results. The numerical results are presented in Table 6 and discussed in Section D.
items.zh: 划分。我们遵循 Mernyei 和 Cangea（2020）定义的划分，该划分有 20 个不同的训练、验证和早停划分，分别包含每个类别的 5% 节点、22.5% 节点和 22.5% 节点。每个类别中不在训练或验证划分中的 50% 节点被分配为测试划分。我们将原始验证划分（22.5% 节点）和早停划分（22.5% 节点）合并为新的验证划分（45% 节点），因为我们在基准中不使用单独的早停划分。训练。作为 GNN 之间一致的学习率策略，初始学习率设为 1×10−2，衰减因子为 0.5，耐心值为 25，停止学习率为 1×10−5。由于有 20 个不同的训练和验证划分，训练使用这些划分进行 20 次，并在单个测试划分上评估。这使用 4 个不同种子重复 4 次。最后，报告 20 × 4 = 80 次运行的平均值。性能度量。性能度量是每个节点预测标签与真实标签之间的分类准确率。结果。数值结果见表 6，并在第 D 节讨论。

full.sec: C.5 Graph Classification with Super-pixel (MNIST/CIFAR10) datasets
full.secZh: C.5 基于超像素（MNIST/CIFAR10）数据集的图分类

items.en: The super-pixels datasets test graph classification using the popular MNIST and CIFAR10 image classification datasets. Our main motivation to use these datasets is as sanity-checks: we expect most GNNs to perform close to 100% for MNIST and well enough for CIFAR10. Besides, the use of super-pixel image datasets is suggestive of the way image datasets can be used for graph learning research.
items.zh: 超像素数据集使用流行的MNIST和CIFAR10图像分类数据集测试图分类。我们使用这些数据集的主要动机是作为合理性检查：我们期望大多数GNN在MNIST上接近100%准确率，在CIFAR10上表现足够好。此外，使用超像素图像数据集暗示了图像数据集可用于图学习研究的方式。

items.en: The original MNIST and CIFAR10 images are converted to graphs using super-pixels. Super-pixels represent small regions of homogeneous intensity in images, and can be extracted with the SLIC technique (Achanta et al., 2012). We use SLIC super-pixels from (Knyazev et al., 2019)222https://github.com/bknyaz/graph_attention_pool. For each sample, we build a k𝑘k-nearest neighbor adjacency matrix with
