We use k=8𝑘8k=8 for both MNIST and CIFAR10, whereas the maximum number of super-pixels (nodes) are 75 and 150 for MNIST and CIFAR10, respectively. The resultant graphs are of sizes 404040-757575 nodes for MNIST and 858585-150150150 nodes for CIFAR10. Figure 14 presents visualizations of the super-pixel graphs.
items.zh: 其中xi, xj是超像素i, j的二维坐标，σx是尺度参数，定义为每个节点k个最近邻的平均距离xk。我们对MNIST和CIFAR10均使用k=8，而MNIST和CIFAR10的最大超像素（节点）数分别为75和150。生成的图大小：MNIST为40-75个节点，CIFAR10为85-150个节点。图14展示了超像素图的可视化。

items.en: Splitting. We use the standard splits of MNIST and CIFAR10. MNIST has 55,0005500055,000 train, 5,00050005,000 validation, 10,0001000010,000 test graphs and CIFAR10 has 45,0004500045,000 train, 5,00050005,000 validation, 10,0001000010,000 test graphs. The 5,00050005,000 graphs for validation set are randomly sampled from the training set and the same splits are used for every GNN. Training. The learning decay rate strategy is adopted with an initial learning rate of 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3}, reduce factor 0.50.50.5, patience value 101010, and the stopping learning rate 1×10−51superscript1051\times 10^{-5} for all GNNs, except for 3WLGNN and RingGNN where we experienced a difficulty in training, leading us to slightly adjust their learning rate schedule hyperparameters. For both 3WLGNN and RingGNN, the patience value is changed to 555. For RingGNN, the initial learning rate is changed to 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4} and the stopping learning rate is changed to 1×10−61superscript1061\times 10^{-6}. Performance Measure. The classification accuracy between the predicted and groundtruth label for each graph is the performance measure. Results. The numerical results are presented in Table 7 and discussed in Section D.
items.zh: 划分。我们使用MNIST和CIFAR10的标准划分。MNIST有55,000个训练图、5,000个验证图、10,000个测试图；CIFAR10有45,000个训练图、5,000个验证图、10,000个测试图。验证集的5,000个图从训练集中随机采样，所有GNN使用相同的划分。训练。采用学习率衰减策略，初始学习率为1×10^{-3}，衰减因子0.5，耐心值10，停止学习率1×10^{-5}，适用于所有GNN，但3WLGNN和RingGNN除外，它们在训练中遇到困难，我们略微调整了其学习率调度超参数。对于3WLGNN和RingGNN，耐心值改为5。对于RingGNN，初始学习率改为1×10^{-4}，停止学习率改为1×10^{-6}。性能度量。每个图的预测标签与真实标签之间的分类准确率作为性能度量。结果。数值结果见表7，并在第D节讨论。

full.sec: C.6 Node Classification with SBM (PATTERN/CLUSTER) datasets
full.secZh: C.6 基于SBM（PATTERN/CLUSTER）数据集的节点分类

items.en: The SBM datasets consider node-level tasks of graph pattern recognition (Scarselli et al., 2009) – PATTERN and semi-supervised graph clustering – CLUSTER. The graphs are generated with the Stochastic Block Model (SBM) (Abbe, 2017), which is widely used to model communities in social networks by modulating the intra- and extra-communities connections, thereby controlling the difficulty of the task. A SBM is a random graph which assigns communities to each node as follows: any two vertices are connected with the probability p𝑝p if they belong to the same community, or they are connected with the probability q𝑞q if they belong to different communities (the value of q𝑞q acts as the noise level).
items.zh: SBM数据集考虑图模式识别（Scarselli等人，2009）的节点级任务——PATTERN和半监督图聚类——CLUSTER。图使用随机块模型（SBM）（Abbe，2017）生成，该模型通过调节社区内和社区间的连接来模拟社交网络中的社区，从而控制任务难度。SBM是一个随机图，按如下方式为每个节点分配社区：任意两个顶点如果属于同一社区，则以概率p连接；如果属于不同社区，则以概率q连接（q值作为噪声水平）。

items.en: PATTERN: The graph pattern recognition task, presented in Scarselli et al. (2009), aims at finding a fixed graph pattern P𝑃P embedded in larger graphs G𝐺G of variable sizes. For all data, we generate graphs G𝐺G with 5 communities with sizes randomly selected between [5,35]535[5,35]. The SBM of each community is p=0.5,q=0.35formulae-sequence𝑝0.5𝑞0.35p=0.5,q=0.35, and the node features on G𝐺G are generated with a uniform random distribution with a vocabulary of size 333, i.e. {0,1,2}012\{0,1,2\}. We randomly generate 100100100 patterns P𝑃P composed of 202020 nodes with intra-probability pP=0.5subscript𝑝𝑃0.5p_{P}=0.5 and extra-probability qP=0.5subscript𝑞𝑃0.5q_{P}=0.5 (i.e., 50% of nodes in P𝑃P are connected to G𝐺G). The node features for P𝑃P are also generated as a random signal with values {0,1,2}012\{0,1,2\}. The graphs are of sizes 444444-188188188 nodes. The output node labels have value 1 if the node belongs to P𝑃P and value 0 if it is in G𝐺G.
items.zh: PATTERN：图模式识别任务，如Scarselli等人（2009）所述，旨在找到嵌入在可变大小的大图G中的固定图模式P。对于所有数据，我们生成具有5个社区的图G，社区大小在[5,35]之间随机选择。每个社区的SBM参数为p=0.5, q=0.35，G上的节点特征使用大小为3的词汇表（即{0,1,2}）的均匀随机分布生成。我们随机生成100个模式P，每个由20个节点组成，内部概率pP=0.5，外部概率qP=0.5（即P中50%的节点与G连接）。P的节点特征也生成为值为{0,1,2}的随机信号。图的大小为44-188个节点。输出节点标签：如果节点属于P，则值为1；如果属于G，则值为0。

items.en: CLUSTER: For the semi-supervised clustering task, we generate 6 SBM clusters with sizes randomly selected between [5,35]535[5,35] and probabilities p=0.55,q=0.25formulae-sequence𝑝0.55𝑞0.25p=0.55,q=0.25. The graphs are of sizes 404040-190190190 nodes. Each node can take an input feature value in {0,1,2,..,6}\{0,1,2,..,6\}. If the value is 1, the node belongs to class 0, value 2 corresponds to class 1, …, value 6 corresponds to class 5. Otherwise, if the value is 0, the class of the node is unknown and will be inferred by the GNN. There is only one labelled node that is randomly assigned to each community and most node features are set to 0. The output node labels are defined as the community/cluster class labels.
items.zh: CLUSTER：对于半监督聚类任务，我们生成6个SBM聚类，大小在[5,35]之间随机选择，概率p=0.55, q=0.25。图的大小为40-190个节点。每个节点可以取{0,1,2,...,6}中的输入特征值。如果值为1，节点属于类别0；值为2对应类别1；...；值为6对应类别5。否则，如果值为0，则节点类别未知，将由GNN推断。每个社区随机分配一个标记节点，大多数节点特征设置为0。输出节点标签定义为社区/聚类类别标签。

items.en: Splitting. The PATTERN dataset has 10,0001000010,000 train, 2,00020002,000 validation, 2,00020002,000 test graphs and CLUSTER dataset has 10,0001000010,000 train, 1,00010001,000 validation, 1,00010001,000 test graphs. We save the generated splits and use the same sets in all models for fair comparison. Training. As presented in the standard experimental protocol in Section C, we use Adam optimizer with a learning rate decay strategy. For all GNNs, an initial learning rate is set to 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3}, the reduce factor is 0.50.50.5, the patience value is 555, and the stopping learning rate is 1×10−51superscript1051\times 10^{-5}. Performance Measure. The performance measure is the average node-level accuracy weighted with respect to the class sizes. Results. Our numerical results are presented in Table 8 and discussed in Section D together with other benchmark results.
items.zh: 划分。PATTERN数据集有10,000个训练图、2,000个验证图、2,000个测试图；CLUSTER数据集有10,000个训练图、1,000个验证图、1,000个测试图。我们保存生成的划分，并在所有模型中使用相同的集合以进行公平比较。训练。如第C节标准实验协议所述，我们使用Adam优化器并采用学习率衰减策略。对于所有GNN，初始学习率设置为1×10^{-3}，衰减因子0.5，耐心值5，停止学习率1×10^{-5}。性能度量。性能度量是按类别大小加权的平均节点级准确率。结果。我们的数值结果见表8，并在第D节与其他基准结果一起讨论。

full.sec: C.7 Edge Classification/Link Prediction with TSP dataset
full.secZh: C.7 基于TSP数据集的边分类/链接预测

items.en: Leveraging machine learning for solving NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems (COPs) has been the focus of intense research in recent years (Vinyals et al., 2015; Bengio et al., 2018). Recently proposed learning-driven solvers for COPs (Khalil et al., 2017; Kool et al., 2019; Joshi et al., 2019) combine GNNs with classical search to predict approximate solutions directly from problem instances (represented as graphs). Consider the intensively studied Travelling Salesman Problem (TSP), which asks the following question: “Given a list of cities and the distances between each pair of cities, what is the shortest possible route that visits each city and returns to the origin city?" Formally, given a 2D Euclidean graph, one needs to find an optimal sequence of nodes, called a tour, with minimal total edge weights (tour length). TSP’s multi-scale nature makes it a challenging graph task which requires reasoning about both local node neighborhoods as well as global graph structure.
items.zh: 利用机器学习解决NP难组合优化问题（COP）是近年来研究的焦点（Vinyals等人，2015；Bengio等人，2018）。最近提出的基于学习的COP求解器（Khalil等人，2017；Kool等人，2019；Joshi等人，2019）将GNN与经典搜索相结合，直接从问题实例（表示为图）预测近似解。考虑被广泛研究的旅行商问题（TSP），它提出以下问题：“给定一系列城市和每对城市之间的距离，访问每个城市并返回原城市的最短可能路线是什么？”形式上，给定一个二维欧几里得图，需要找到一个最优节点序列（称为回路），使得总边权重（回路长度）最小。TSP的多尺度性质使其成为一个具有挑战性的图任务，需要同时推理局部节点邻域和全局图结构。

items.en: For our experiments with TSP, we follow the learning-based approach to COPs described in Joshi et al. (2022), where a GNN is the backbone architecture for assigning probabilities to each edge as belonging/not belonging to the predicted solution set. The probabilities are then converted into discrete decisions through graph search techniques. Each instance is a graph of n𝑛n node locations sampled uniformly in the unit square S={xi}i=1n𝑆superscriptsubscriptsubscript𝑥𝑖𝑖1𝑛S=\{x_{i}\}_{i=1}^{n} and xi∈[0,1]2subscript𝑥𝑖superscript012x_{i}\in{[0,1]}^{2}. We generate problems of varying size and complexity by uniformly sampling the number of nodes n∈[50,500]𝑛50500n\in[50,500] for each instance.
items.zh: 对于我们的TSP实验，我们遵循Joshi等人（2022）描述的基于学习的COP方法，其中GNN作为骨干架构，为每条边分配属于/不属于预测解集的概率。然后通过图搜索技术将概率转换为离散决策。每个实例是一个包含n个节点位置的图，节点位置在单位正方形S={xi}_{i=1}^n中均匀采样，xi∈[0,1]^2。我们通过为每个实例均匀采样节点数n∈[50,500]来生成不同大小和复杂性的问题。

items.en: In order to isolate the impact of the backbone GNN architectures from the search component, we pose TSP as a binary edge classification task, with the groundtruth value for each edge belonging to the TSP tour given by Concorde (Applegate et al., 2006). For scaling to large instances, we use sparse k=25𝑘25k=25 nearest neighbor graphs instead of full graphs, following (Khalil et al., 2017). See Figure 15 for sample TSP instances of various sizes.
items.zh: 为了隔离骨干GNN架构与搜索组件的影响，我们将TSP视为一个二元边分类任务，每条边属于TSP回路的地面真实值由Concorde（Applegate等人，2006）给出。为了扩展到大规模实例，我们使用稀疏的k=25近邻图而不是全图，遵循（Khalil等人，2017）。不同大小的TSP实例样本见图15。

items.en: Splitting. TSP has 10,0001000010,000 train, 1,00010001,000 validation and 1,00010001,000 test graphs. Training. All GNNs use a consistent learning rate strategy: an initial learning rate is set to 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3}, the reduce factor is 0.50.50.5, the patience value is 101010, and the stopping learning rate is 1×10−51superscript1051\times 10^{-5}. Performance Measure. Given the high class imbalance, i.e., only the edges in the TSP tour have positive label, we use the F1 score for the positive class as our performance measure. Non-learnt Baseline. In addition to reporting performance of GNNs, we compare with a simple k𝑘k-nearest neighbor heuristic baseline, defined as follows: Predict true for the edges corresponding to the k𝑘k nearest neighbors of each node, and false for all other edges. We set k𝑘k = 2 for optimal performance. Comparing GNNs to the non-learnt baseline tells us whether models learn something more sophisticated than identifying a node’s nearest neighbors. Results. The numerical results are presented in Table 9 and analysed in Section D.
items.zh: 划分。TSP有10,000个训练图、1,000个验证图和1,000个测试图。训练。所有GNN使用一致的学习率策略：初始学习率设置为1×10^{-3}，衰减因子0.5，耐心值10，停止学习率1×10^{-5}。性能度量。鉴于类别高度不平衡（即只有TSP回路中的边具有正标签），我们使用正类的F1分数作为性能度量。非学习基线。除了报告GNN的性能外，我们还与一个简单的k近邻启发式基线进行比较，定义如下：预测每个节点的k个最近邻对应的边为真，其他所有边为假。我们设置k=2以获得最佳性能。将GNN与非学习基线进行比较，可以判断模型是否学习了比识别节点最近邻更复杂的东西。结果。数值结果见表9，并在第D节分析。

full.sec: C.8 Graph Classification and Isomorphism Testing with CSL dataset
full.secZh: C.8 基于CSL数据集的图分类与同构测试

items.en: The Circular Skip Link dataset is a symmetric graph dataset introduced in Murphy et al. (2019) to test the expressivity of GNNs. Each CSL graph is a 4-regular graph with edges connected to form a cycle and containing skip-links between nodes. Formally, it is denoted by 𝒢N,Csubscript𝒢𝑁𝐶\mathcal{G}_{N,C} where N𝑁N is the number of nodes and C𝐶C is the isomorphism class which is the skip-link length of the graph. We use the same dataset 𝒢41,Csubscript𝒢41𝐶\mathcal{G}_{41,C} with C∈{2,3,4,5,6,9,11,12,13,16}𝐶23456911121316C\in\{2,3,4,5,6,9,11,12,13,16\}. The dataset is class-balanced with 151515 graphs for every C𝐶C resulting in a total of 150150150 graphs.
items.zh: 循环跳链数据集是Murphy等人（2019）引入的对称图数据集，用于测试GNN的表达能力。每个CSL图是一个4-正则图，边连接形成环，并在节点之间包含跳链。形式上，记为G_{N,C}，其中N是节点数，C是同构类，即图的跳链长度。我们使用相同的数据集G_{41,C}，其中C∈{2,3,4,5,6,9,11,12,13,16}。数据集是类别平衡的，每个C有15个图，总共150个图。

items.en: Splitting. We perform a 5-fold cross validation split, following Murphy et al. (2019), which gives 5 sets of train, validation and test data indices in the ratio 3:1:1:31:13:1:1. We use stratified sampling to ensure that the class distribution remains the same across splits. The indices are saved and used across all experiments for fair comparisons. Training. For the learning rate strategy across all GNNs, an initial learning rate is set to 5×10−45superscript1045\times 10^{-4}, the reduce factor is 0.50.50.5, the patience value is 555, and the stopping learning rate is 1×10−61superscript1061\times 10^{-6}. We train on the 5-fold cross validation with 20 different seeds of initialization, following Chen et al. (2019b). Performance Measure. We use graph classification accuracy between the predicted labels and groundtruth labels as our performance measure. The model performance is evaluated on the test split of the 5 folds at every run, and following Murphy et al. (2019); Chen et al. (2019b), we report the maximum, minimum, average and the standard deviation of the 100 scores, i.e., 20 runs of 5-folds. Results. The numerical results are reported in Table 10 and analyzed in Section E.1. In this paper, we use CSL primarily to validate the impact of having Graph Positional Encodings (Section E.1) that is proposed as a demonstration of our benchmarking framework to steer new GNN research.
items.zh: 划分。我们进行5折交叉验证划分，遵循Murphy等人（2019），得到5组训练、验证和测试数据索引，比例为3:1:1。我们使用分层抽样以确保类别分布在各折中保持一致。索引被保存并在所有实验中使用以进行公平比较。训练。对于所有GNN的学习率策略，初始学习率设置为5×10^{-4}，衰减因子0.5，耐心值5，停止学习率1×10^{-6}。我们使用20个不同的初始化种子进行5折交叉验证训练，遵循Chen等人（2019b）。性能度量。我们使用图分类准确率（预测标签与真实标签之间）作为性能度量。模型性能在每次运行的5折测试集上评估，并遵循Murphy等人（2019）；Chen等人（2019b），报告100个分数（即20次运行×5折）的最大值、最小值、平均值和标准差。结果。数值结果见表10，并在第E.1节分析。在本文中，我们主要使用CSL来验证图位置编码（第E.1节）的影响，这是作为我们基准测试框架引导新GNN研究的演示。

full.sec: C.9 Cycle Detection with CYCLES dataset
full.secZh: C.9 基于CYCLES数据集的环检测

items.en: The CYCLES is a dataset synthetically generated by Loukas (2020) which contains equal number of graphs with and without cycles of fixed lengths. The task is a binary classification task to detect whether a graph has cycle or not. Though there are several forms of the dataset used in Loukas (2020) in terms of the number of nodes and cycle lengths, we select the dataset variant marked with having node size 56 and cycle length 6, based on the difficulty results shown by the author. The graphs have nodes in the range 37-65.
items.zh: CYCLES数据集由Loukas（2020）合成生成，包含等量的有固定长度环和无环的图。任务是检测图是否有环的二元分类任务。尽管Loukas（2020）中使用的数据集在节点数和环长度方面有几种形式，但根据作者显示的难度结果，我们选择了节点大小为56、环长度为6的数据集变体。图的节点范围在37-65之间。

items.en: Splitting. We use the same dataset splits as in Loukas (2020). Originally there 10,000 graphs each in the training and test sets. We sample 1,000 class balanced graphs from the training set to be used as validation samples. Therefore, the resulting CYCLES dataset has 9,000 train/ 1,000 validation/10,000 test graphs with all the sets having class-balanced samples. We show results on different sizes of training samples following the original author of CYCLES dataset. Training. For the learning rate strategy, an initial learning rate is set to 1×10−41superscript1041\times 10^{-4}, the reduce factor is 0.50.50.5, the patience value is 101010, and the stopping learning rate is 1×10−61superscript1061\times 10^{-6}. Following Loukas (2020), we train using a varying sample size from 200200200 to 5,00050005,000 out of the training graphs and report the results accordingly. The reported results are based on 4 runs with 4 different seeds. Performance Measure. The classification accuracy between the predicted and groundtruth label for whether a graph has cycle or not is the performance measure. Results. Similar to the CSL dataset (Section C.8), we use the CYCLES dataset mainly for the validation of the Graph Positional Encodings (Section E.1) proposed as an outcome of this benchmarking framework. As such, we train only a subset of MP-GCNs (GINs and GatedGCNs) and report the respective results. The numerical results are reported in Table 11 and analyzed in Section E.1.
items.zh: 划分。我们使用与 Loukas (2020) 相同的数据集划分。最初训练集和测试集各有 10,000 个图。我们从训练集中采样 1,000 个类别平衡的图作为验证样本。因此，最终的 CYCLES 数据集包含 9,000 个训练图、1,000 个验证图和 10,000 个测试图，所有集合均具有类别平衡的样本。我们按照 CYCLES 数据集原始作者的做法，展示了不同训练样本量下的结果。训练。对于学习率策略，初始学习率设置为 1×10⁻⁴，衰减因子为 0.5，耐心值为 10，停止学习率为 1×10⁻⁶。遵循 Loukas (2020)，我们使用从训练图中抽取的 200 到 5,000 个不同样本量进行训练，并相应报告结果。报告的结果基于 4 次不同种子的运行。性能度量。性能度量是预测标签与真实标签之间关于图是否包含环的分类准确率。结果。与 CSL 数据集（第 C.8 节）类似，我们主要使用 CYCLES 数据集来验证作为本基准测试框架成果提出的图位置编码（第 E.1 节）。因此，我们仅训练 MP-GCN（GIN 和 GatedGCN）的一个子集，并报告相应结果。数值结果见表 11，并在第 E.1 节中进行分析。

full.sec: C.10 Multi-task graph properties with GraphTheoryProp dataset
full.secZh: C.10 基于GraphTheoryProp数据集的多任务图属性

items.en: Corso et al. (2020) proposed a synthetic dataset of undirected and unweighted graphs of diverse types randomly generated for a multi-task benchmarking of 6 graph-theoretic properties, 3 at the node-level and 3 at the graph-level. We call this dataset as GraphTheoryProp. The node-level tasks are to determine single source shortest paths (Dist.), node eccentricity (Ecc.), and Laplacian features L​X𝐿𝑋LX given a node feature vector X𝑋X (Lap.) The graph-level tasks are graph connectivity (Conn.), diameter (Diam.) and spectral radius (Rad.). The dataset has graph sizes in the range of 15-24 nodes which have random identifiers as input features. This dataset is crucial to benchmark the robustness of a GNN to predict specific or overall of all the 6 properties, as these may share subroutines such as graph traversals, despite the tasks being different graph properties (Corso et al., 2020).
items.zh: Corso 等人 (2020) 提出了一个合成数据集，包含随机生成的各种类型的无向无权图，用于对 6 个图论属性进行多任务基准测试，其中 3 个为节点级，3 个为图级。我们将此数据集称为 GraphTheoryProp。节点级任务是确定单源最短路径（Dist.）、节点离心率（Ecc.）以及给定节点特征向量 X 的拉普拉斯特征 LX（Lap.）。图级任务是图连通性（Conn.）、直径（Diam.）和谱半径（Rad.）。该数据集的图大小在 15-24 个节点之间，输入特征为随机标识符。该数据集对于基准测试 GNN 预测特定或全部 6 个属性的鲁棒性至关重要，因为这些属性可能共享子程序（如图遍历），尽管任务是不同的图属性（Corso 等人，2020）。

items.en: Splitting. We use the same splitting sets as in Corso et al. (2020) which has 5,120 train, 640 validation, 1,280 test graphs. Training. For the learning rate strategy, an initial learning rate is set to 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3}, the reduce factor is 0.50.50.5, the patience value is 151515, and the stopping learning rate is 1×10−61superscript1061\times 10^{-6}. The reported results are based on 4 runs with 4 different seeds. Performance Measure. For performance measure, L​o​g10𝐿𝑜subscript𝑔10{Log}_{10}MSE is reported between the predicted and groundtruth values for each single task. Besides, an average performance measure is reported which is the combined average of all the 6 tasks. Results. As with the CSL and CYCLES datasets (Sections C.8, C.9), we use GraphTheoryProp in this paper for the validation of Graph Positional Encodings, Section E.1. The numerical results are reported in Table 12 and analyzed in Section E.1.
items.zh: 划分。我们使用与 Corso 等人 (2020) 相同的划分集，包含 5,120 个训练图、640 个验证图和 1,280 个测试图。训练。对于学习率策略，初始学习率设置为 1×10⁻³，衰减因子为 0.5，耐心值为 15，停止学习率为 1×10⁻⁶。报告的结果基于 4 次不同种子的运行。性能度量。对于性能度量，报告每个单独任务的预测值与真实值之间的 Log₁₀ MSE。此外，还报告了所有 6 个任务的平均性能度量。结果。与 CSL 和 CYCLES 数据集（第 C.8、C.9 节）一样，我们在本文中使用 GraphTheoryProp 来验证图位置编码（第 E.1 节）。数值结果见表 12，并在第 E.1 节中进行分析。

full.sec: Appendix D Analysis and Discussion of Benchmarking Results
full.secZh: 附录D 基准测试结果分析与讨论

items.en: This section highlights the main take-home messages from the experiments in Section C on the datasets in the proposed framework, which evaluate the GNNs from Section B with the experimental setup described in Section C and respective sub-sections of each datasets.
items.zh: 本节重点介绍第 C 节中关于所提出框架内数据集的实验的主要结论，这些实验使用第 C 节及每个数据集相应子节中描述的实验设置，评估了第 B 节中的 GNN。

items.en: Graph-agnostic NNs perform poorly. As a sanity check, we compare all GNNs to a simple graph-agnostic MLP baseline which updates each node independent of one-other, hiℓ+1=σ​(Wℓ​hiℓ)subscriptsuperscriptℎℓ1𝑖𝜎superscript𝑊ℓsubscriptsuperscriptℎℓ𝑖h^{\ell+1}_{i}=\sigma\left(W^{\ell}\ h^{\ell}_{i}\right), and passes these features to the task-based layer. MLP presents consistently low scores across all datasets (Tables 3-10), which shows the necessity to use graph structure for these tasks. All proposed datasets used in our study are appropriate to statistically separate GNN performance, which has remained an issue with the widely used but small graph datasets (Errica et al., 2019; Luzhnica et al., 2019).
items.zh: 图无关的神经网络表现不佳。作为合理性检查，我们将所有 GNN 与一个简单的图无关 MLP 基线进行比较，该基线独立更新每个节点：h_i^{ℓ+1} = σ(W^ℓ h_i^ℓ)，并将这些特征传递给基于任务的层。MLP 在所有数据集上始终呈现低分数（表 3-10），这表明在这些任务中使用图结构的必要性。我们研究中使用的所有提议数据集都适合在统计上区分 GNN 性能，而广泛使用但较小的图数据集一直存在这个问题（Errica 等人，2019；Luzhnica 等人，2019）。

items.en: GCNs outperform WL-GNNs on the proposed datasets. Although provably powerful in terms of graph isomorphism tests and invariant function approximation (Maron et al., 2019c; Chen et al., 2019b; Morris et al., 2019), the recent 3WLGNNs and RingGNNs were not able to outperform GCNs for our medium-scale datasets, as shown in Tables 3-5 and 7-9. These new models are limited in terms of space/time complexities, with O​(n2)/O​(n3)𝑂superscript𝑛2𝑂superscript𝑛3O(n^{2})/O(n^{3}) respectively, not allowing them to scale to larger datasets. On the contrary, GCNs with linear complexity w.r.t. the number of nodes for sparse graphs, can scale conveniently to 16 layers and show the best performance on all datasets. 3WL-GNNs and RingGNNs face loss divergence and/or out-of-memory errors when trying to build deeper networks.
items.zh: GCN 在所提出的数据集上优于 WL-GNN。尽管在图同构测试和不变函数逼近方面具有可证明的强大能力（Maron 等人，2019c；Chen 等人，2019b；Morris 等人，2019），但最近的 3WLGNN 和 RingGNN 在我们的中等规模数据集上未能超越 GCN，如表 3-5 和 7-9 所示。这些新模型在空间/时间复杂度方面受到限制，分别为 O(n²)/O(n³)，无法扩展到更大的数据集。相反，GCN 对于稀疏图具有关于节点数的线性复杂度，可以方便地扩展到 16 层，并在所有数据集上表现出最佳性能。3WL-GNN 和 RingGNN 在尝试构建更深网络时面临损失发散和/或内存不足错误。

items.en: Anisotropic mechanisms improve GCNs. Among the models in the GCN class, the best results point towards the anisotropic models, particularly GAT and GatedGCN, which are based on sparse and dense attention mechanisms, respectively. For instance, results for ZINC, AQSOL, WikiCS, MNIST, CIFAR10, PATTERN and CLUSTER in respective Tables 3, 4, 6, 7, 8 show that the performance of the 100K-parameter anisotropic GNNs (GCN with symmetric normalization, GAT, MoNet, GatedGCN) are consistently better than the isotropic models (vanilla GCN, GraphSage), except for vanilla GCN-WikiCS, GraphSage-MNIST and MoNet-CIFAR10. Table 14, discussed later, dissects and demonstrates the importance of anisotropy for the link prediction tasks, TSP and COLLAB. Overall, our results suggest that understanding the expressive power of attention-based neighborhood aggregation functions is a meaningful avenue of research.
items.zh: 各向异性机制改进了 GCN。在 GCN 类模型中，最佳结果指向各向异性模型，特别是 GAT 和 GatedGCN，它们分别基于稀疏和密集注意力机制。例如，ZINC、AQSOL、WikiCS、MNIST、CIFAR10、PATTERN 和 CLUSTER 的结果（分别在表 3、4、6、7、8 中）表明，100K 参数的各向异性 GNN（对称归一化的 GCN、GAT、MoNet、GatedGCN）的性能始终优于各向同性模型（vanilla GCN、GraphSage），除了 vanilla GCN-WikiCS、GraphSage-MNIST 和 MoNet-CIFAR10。稍后讨论的表 14 剖析并展示了各向异性对于链接预测任务 TSP 和 COLLAB 的重要性。总体而言，我们的结果表明，理解基于注意力的邻域聚合函数的表达能力是一个有意义的研究方向。

items.en: Underlying challenges for training WL-GNNs. We consistently observe a relatively high standard deviation in the performance of WL-GNNs (recall that we average across 4 runs using 4 different seeds). We attribute this fluctuation to the absence of universal training procedures like batching and batch normalization, as these GNNs operate on dense rank-2 tensors of variable sizes. On the other hand, GCNs running on sparse tensors better leverage batched training and normalization for stable and fast training. Leading graph machine learning libraries represent batches of graphs as sparse block diagonal matrices, enabling batched training of GCNs through parallelized computation (Jia et al., 2019).
items.zh: 训练 WL-GNN 的潜在挑战。我们一致观察到 WL-GNN 性能的标准差相对较高（回想一下，我们使用 4 个不同种子平均了 4 次运行）。我们将这种波动归因于缺乏通用的训练程序，如批处理和批归一化，因为这些 GNN 在可变大小的密集秩 2 张量上运行。另一方面，在稀疏张量上运行的 GCN 更好地利用批处理训练和归一化来实现稳定快速的训练。领先的图机器学习库将图的批次表示为稀疏块对角矩阵，通过并行计算实现 GCN 的批处理训练（Jia 等人，2019）。

items.en: Dense tensors are incompatible with the prevalent approach, disabling the use of batch normalization for WL-GNNs. We experimented with layer normalization (Ba et al., 2016) but without success. We were also unable to train WL-GNNs on CPU memory for the single COLLAB graph, see Table 5. Practical applications of the new WL-GNNs may require redesigning the best practices and common building blocks of deep learning, i.e. batching of variable-sized data, normalization schemes, and residual connections.
items.zh: 密集张量与主流方法不兼容，导致无法对 WL-GNN 使用批归一化。我们尝试了层归一化（Ba 等人，2016），但没有成功。我们也无法在 CPU 内存上为单个 COLLAB 图训练 WL-GNN，见表 5。新的 WL-GNN 的实际应用可能需要重新设计深度学习的最佳实践和常见构建模块，即可变大小数据的批处理、归一化方案和残差连接。

items.en: 3WL-GNNs perform the best among their class. Among the models in the WL-GNN class, 3WL-GNN provide better results than its similar counter-part RingGNN and achieves close to the best performance for AQSOL, see Table 4. The GIN model, while being less expressive, is able to scale better and provides overall good performance.
items.zh: 3WL-GNN 在其类别中表现最佳。在 WL-GNN 类模型中，3WL-GNN 提供了比其类似对应模型 RingGNN 更好的结果，并在 AQSOL 上接近最佳性能，见表 4。GIN 模型虽然表达能力较弱，但能够更好地扩展并提供整体良好的性能。

full.sec: Appendix E Studies using the Benchmarking Framework
full.secZh: 附录E 基于基准测试框架的研究

items.en: One of the primary goals of this benchmarking framework is to facilitate researchers to perform new explorations conveniently and develop insights that improve our overall understanding of graph neural networks. This section provides a demonstration of two such studies that we carry out by leveraging the datasets and the coding infrastructure which are part of this framework. First, we explore the absence of positional information in graphs for MP-GCNs which induces their low representation power. As a result, we develop a new insight that Laplacian eigenvectors can very simply be used as graph positional encodings and improve MP-GCNs. This insight has been received keenly in the recent literature and there are a number of works that propose positional encoding schemes with some addressing the challenges of using Laplacian eigenvectors (Kreuzer et al., 2021; Wang et al., 2022; Lim et al., 2022). Second, we study and show how the modification of existing MP-GCNs with joint edge representations help the models perform comparatively better than their vanilla counterparts.
items.zh: 本基准测试框架的主要目标之一是方便研究人员进行新的探索，并发展有助于提高我们对图神经网络整体理解的见解。本节演示了我们利用该框架中的数据集和编码基础设施进行的两项此类研究。首先，我们探讨了 MP-GCN 中位置信息的缺失导致其表示能力低下的问题。因此，我们提出了一个新的见解：拉普拉斯特征向量可以非常简单地用作图位置编码，从而改进 MP-GCN。这一见解在最近的文献中受到热切关注，并且有许多工作提出了位置编码方案，其中一些解决了使用拉普拉斯特征向量的挑战（Kreuzer 等人，2021；Wang 等人，2022；Lim 等人，2022）。其次，我们研究并展示了如何通过联合边表示修改现有的 MP-GCN，使模型比其原始版本表现更好。

full.sec: E.1 Laplacian Positional Encodings
full.secZh: E.1 拉普拉斯位置编码

items.en: As discussed in Section D, MP-GCNs outperforms WL-GNNs on the diverse collection of datasets included in our proposed benchmark despite having theoretical limitations derived from the alignment of MP-GCNs to the WL-tests. Also, WL-GNNs were found to be computationally infeasible on medium and large scale datasets. Motivated by these results, we propose ‘Graph Positional Encodings’ using Laplacian eigenvectors, thus referred as Laplacian Positional Encodings, to improve the theoretical shortcomings of MP-GCNs, which allows us to retain the computationally efficiency offered by the message-passing framework and improve the MP-GCNs performance.
items.zh: 如第 D 节所述，MP-GCN 在我们提出的基准测试中包含的多样化数据集上优于 WL-GNN，尽管由于 MP-GCN 与 WL 测试的对齐而存在理论限制。此外，WL-GNN 在中型和大型数据集上被发现在计算上不可行。受这些结果的启发，我们提出使用拉普拉斯特征向量的“图位置编码”，称为拉普拉斯位置编码，以改善 MP-GCN 的理论缺陷，从而保留消息传递框架提供的计算效率并提高 MP-GCN 的性能。

items.en: In Murphy et al. (2019); Srinivasan and Ribeiro (2020), it was pointed out that standard MP-GCNs might perform poorly when dealing with graphs that exhibit some symmetries in their structures, such as node or edge isomorphism. This is related to the limitation of MP-GCNs due to their equivalence to the 1-WL test (Xu et al., 2019; Morris et al., 2019). The equivalence is based on the condition when MP-GCNs handle anonymous nodes (Loukas, 2020), i.e. nodes do not have unique node features. To address this issue of anonymous MP-GCNs, Murphy et al. (2019) introduced a framework, called Graph Relational Pooling (GRP), that assigns to each node an identifier that depends on the index ordering. This approach can be computationally expensive as it requires to account for all n!𝑛n! node permutations, thus requiring some sampling in practice. You et al. (2019) proposed learnable position-aware embeddings based on random anchor sets of nodes for pairwise node (or, link) tasks. However, the random selection of anchor sets has limitations and their approach is not applicable on inductive node tasks. Similarly, one could think of using full or partial random node identifiers for breaking node-anonymity. Yet, it suffers from generalization to unseen graphs (You et al., 2019; Loukas, 2020). Li et al. (2020) proposed the use of distance encoding as node attributes which captures distances between nodes using power(s) of random walk matrix. However, their failure on distance regular graphs (Li et al., 2020) and the cost of computing the power matrices may be limiting to scale to diverse and medium to large-scale graphs. We improve upon these works and propose the use of Laplacian eigenvectors as positional encodings.
items.zh: 在 Murphy 等人 (2019)；Srinivasan 和 Ribeiro (2020) 中，指出标准 MP-GCN 在处理结构上具有某些对称性的图（如节点或边同构）时可能表现不佳。这与 MP-GCN 由于等价于 1-WL 测试而存在的局限性有关（Xu 等人，2019；Morris 等人，2019）。这种等价性基于 MP-GCN 处理匿名节点（Loukas，2020）的条件，即节点没有唯一的节点特征。为了解决匿名 MP-GCN 的这个问题，Murphy 等人 (2019) 引入了一个称为图关系池化（GRP）的框架，该框架为每个节点分配一个依赖于索引顺序的标识符。这种方法计算成本高，因为它需要考虑所有 n! 种节点排列，因此在实践中需要一些采样。You 等人 (2019) 提出了基于随机锚点集的可学习位置感知嵌入，用于成对节点（或链接）任务。然而，锚点集的随机选择存在局限性，并且他们的方法不适用于归纳节点任务。类似地，可以考虑使用完全或部分随机节点标识符来打破节点匿名性。然而，这存在对未见图泛化的问题（You 等人，2019；Loukas，2020）。Li 等人 (2020) 提出使用距离编码作为节点属性，通过随机游走矩阵的幂来捕获节点之间的距离。然而，它们在距离正则图上的失败（Li 等人，2020）以及计算幂矩阵的成本可能限制其扩展到多样化和中到大规模的图。我们在这些工作的基础上进行改进，并提出使用拉普拉斯特征向量作为位置编码。

items.en: We keep the overall MP-GCN architecture and simply add positional features to each node before processing the graph through the MP-GCN. Intuitively, the positional features should be chosen such that nodes which are far apart in the graph have different positional features whereas nodes which are nearby have similar positional features. As node positional features, we propose to use graph Laplacian eigenvectors (Belkin and Niyogi, 2003), which have less ambiguities and which better describe the distance between nodes on the graph. Formally, Laplacian eigenvectors are spectral techniques that embed the graphs into the Euclidean space. These vectors form a meaningful local coordinate system, while preserving the global graph structure. Mathematically, they are defined via the factorization of the graph Laplacian matrix;
items.zh: 我们保持整体 MP-GCN 架构不变，仅在通过 MP-GCN 处理图之前向每个节点添加位置特征。直观地说，位置特征的选择应使得图中相距较远的节点具有不同的位置特征，而相邻的节点具有相似的位置特征。作为节点位置特征，我们建议使用图拉普拉斯特征向量（Belkin 和 Niyogi，2003），它具有更少的歧义性，并且能更好地描述图上节点之间的距离。形式上，拉普拉斯特征向量是将图嵌入欧几里得空间的谱技术。这些向量形成了一个有意义的局部坐标系，同时保留了全局图结构。数学上，它们通过图拉普拉斯矩阵的分解来定义：

items.en: where A𝐴A is the n×n𝑛𝑛n\times n adjacency matrix, D𝐷D is the degree matrix, and ΛΛ\Lambda, U𝑈U correspond respectively to the eigenvalues and eigenvectors. Laplacian eigenvectors also represent a natural generalization of the Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) positional encodings (PE) for graphs as the eigenvectors of a discrete line (NLP graph) are the cosine and sinusoidal functions. The computational complexity O​(E3/2)𝑂superscript𝐸32O(E^{3/2}), with E𝐸E being the number of edges, can be improved with, e.g. the Nystrom method (Fowlkes et al., 2004). The eigenvectors are defined up to the factor ±1plus-or-minus1\pm 1 (after being normalized to unit length), so the sign of eigenvectors will be randomly flipped during training. For the experiments, we use the k𝑘k smallest non-trivial eigenvectors, where the k𝑘k value is given in the respective experiment tables in Section C as the dimensions of the PE. The smallest eigenvectors provide smooth encoding coordinates of neighboring nodes. See Section E.1.4 for additional discussion about positional encodings and the reasoning behind our decision to use random sign flipping.
items.zh: 其中 A 是 n×n 邻接矩阵，D 是度矩阵，Λ 和 U 分别对应特征值和特征向量。拉普拉斯特征向量也代表了 Transformer（Vaswani 等人，2017）位置编码在图上的自然推广，因为离散线（NLP 图）的特征向量是余弦和正弦函数。计算复杂度 O(E^{3/2})，其中 E 是边数，可以通过例如 Nystrom 方法（Fowlkes 等人，2004）来改进。特征向量在归一化为单位长度后定义到因子 ±1，因此训练期间特征向量的符号会随机翻转。在实验中，我们使用 k 个最小的非平凡特征向量，k 值在相应实验表的第 C 节中作为 PE 的维度给出。最小的特征向量提供了相邻节点的平滑编码坐标。关于位置编码以及我们决定使用随机符号翻转的更多讨论，请参见第 E.1.4 节。

items.en: We first use the mathematical graphs such as CSL, CYCLES and GraphTheoryProp included in our benchmark (Sections C.8-C.10) to validate the proposed Laplacian PE as simple augmentations in MP-GCNs to improve their performance on the datasets. On CSL dataset, Table 10 compares the MP-GCNs using the Laplacian eigenvectors as PE and the WL-GNNs. The MP-GCN models were the most accurate with 99% of mean accuracy, while 3WL-GNN obtained 97% and RingGNN 25% with our experimental setting. Similarly, in Table 11 for CYCLES dataset and Table 12 for GraphTheoryProp dataset, where we simply select 2 representative MP-GCNs (GINs and GatedGCNs), we observe a consistent improvement in the performance when GINs and GatedGCNs are augmented with Laplacian PE. This demonstrates the importance of positional features to successfully detect cycles in a graph, and also predict critical theoretical and geometric properties in a graph.
items.zh: 我们首先使用基准测试中包含的数学图，如 CSL、CYCLES 和 GraphTheoryProp（第 C.8-C.10 节），来验证所提出的拉普拉斯 PE 作为 MP-GCN 的简单增强，以提高它们在这些数据集上的性能。在 CSL 数据集上，表 10 比较了使用拉普拉斯特征向量作为 PE 的 MP-GCN 和 WL-GNN。MP-GCN 模型最准确，平均准确率达到 99%，而 3WL-GNN 在我们的实验设置下达到 97%，RingGNN 达到 25%。类似地，在 CYCLES 数据集的表 11 和 GraphTheoryProp 数据集的表 12 中，我们仅选择两个代表性的 MP-GCN（GIN 和 GatedGCN），观察到当 GIN 和 GatedGCN 增强拉普拉斯 PE 时，性能持续提升。这证明了位置特征对于成功检测图中的环以及预测图中关键的理论和几何属性的重要性。

items.en: Next, we study ZINC, AQSOL, WikiCS, PATTERN, CLUSTER and COLLAB with PE (note that MNIST, CIFAR10 and TSP do not need PE as the nodes in these graphs already have features describing their positions in ℝ2superscriptℝ2\mathbb{R}^{2}). We observe a boost of performance for ZINC, AQSOL and CLUSTER (it was expected as eigenvectors are good indicators of clusters (Von Luxburg, 2007)), an improvement for PATTERN, and statistically the same result for COLLAB, see the respective tables in Section C. This way, MP-GCNs can be augmented with Laplacian PE to overcome their limitations of not being able to detect simple graph symmetries. Additionally, PEs also boost the models’ performance on real-world graph learning tasks.
items.zh: 接下来，我们研究带有 PE 的 ZINC、AQSOL、WikiCS、PATTERN、CLUSTER 和 COLLAB（注意，MNIST、CIFAR10 和 TSP 不需要 PE，因为这些图中的节点已经具有描述其在 ℝ² 中位置的特征）。我们观察到 ZINC、AQSOL 和 CLUSTER 的性能提升（这是预期的，因为特征向量是聚类的良好指标（Von Luxburg，2007）），PATTERN 的性能提升，以及 COLLAB 的统计相同结果，参见第 C 节中的相应表格。这样，MP-GCN 可以通过拉普拉斯 PE 增强，以克服无法检测简单图对称性的局限性。此外，PE 还提升了模型在真实世界图学习任务上的性能。

items.en: Ideally, positional encodings (PEs) should be unique for each node, and nodes which are far apart in the graph should have different positional features whereas nodes which are nearby have similar positional features. Note that in a graph that has some symmetries, positional features cannot be assigned in a canonical way. For example, if node i𝑖i and node j𝑗j are structurally symmetric, and we have positional features pi=asubscript𝑝𝑖𝑎p_{i}=a, pj=bsubscript𝑝𝑗𝑏p_{j}=b that differentiate them, then it is also possible to arbitrary choose pi=bsubscript𝑝𝑖𝑏p_{i}=b, pj=asubscript𝑝𝑗𝑎p_{j}=a since i𝑖i and j𝑗j are completely symmetric by definition. In other words, the PE is always arbitrary up to the number of symmetries in the graph. As a consequence, the network will have to learn to deal with these ambiguities during training. The simplest possible positional encodings is to give an (arbitrary) ordering to the nodes, among n!𝑛n! possible orderings. During training, the orderings are uniformly sampled from the n!𝑛n! possible choices in order for the network to learn to be independent to these arbitrary choices (Murphy et al., 2019).
items.zh: 理想情况下，位置编码（PE）对于每个节点应该是唯一的，并且图中相距较远的节点应具有不同的位置特征，而相邻节点应具有相似的位置特征。注意，在具有某些对称性的图中，位置特征不能以规范方式分配。例如，如果节点 i 和节点 j 结构对称，并且我们使用位置特征 p_i = a, p_j = b 来区分它们，那么也可以任意选择 p_i = b, p_j = a，因为根据定义 i 和 j 完全对称。换句话说，PE 总是任意的，取决于图中的对称性数量。因此，网络必须在训练期间学会处理这些歧义。最简单的可能位置编码是给节点一个（任意的）顺序，在 n! 种可能的顺序中。在训练期间，顺序从 n! 种可能选择中均匀采样，以便网络学会独立于这些任意选择（Murphy 等人，2019）。

items.en: We propose an alternative to reduce the sampling space, and therefore the amount of ambiguities to be resolved by the network. Laplacian eigenvectors are hybrid positional and structural encodings, as they are invariant by node re-parametrization. However, they are also limited by natural symmetries such as the arbitrary sign of eigenvectors (after being normalized to have unit length). The number of possible sign flips is 2ksuperscript2𝑘2^{k}, where k𝑘k is the number of eigenvectors. In practice we choose k≪nmuch-less-than𝑘𝑛k\ll n, and therefore 2ksuperscript2𝑘2^{k} is much smaller n!𝑛n! (the number of possible ordering of the nodes). During the training, the eigenvectors will be uniformly sampled at random between the 2ksuperscript2𝑘2^{k} possibilities. If we do not seek to learn the invariance w.r.t. all possible sign flips of eigenvectors, then we can remove the sign ambiguity of eigenvectors by taking the absolute value. This choice seriously degrades the expressivity power of the positional features.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种替代方案来减少采样空间，从而减少网络需要解决的歧义量。拉普拉斯特征向量是混合的位置和结构编码，因为它们对节点重新参数化不变。然而，它们也受到自然对称性的限制，例如特征向量的任意符号（在归一化为单位长度后）。可能的符号翻转次数为 2^k，其中 k 是特征向量的数量。在实践中，我们选择 k ≪ n，因此 2^k 远小于 n!（节点可能顺序的数量）。在训练期间，特征向量将在 2^k 种可能性之间随机均匀采样。如果我们不寻求学习关于所有可能特征向量符号翻转的不变性，那么我们可以通过取绝对值来消除特征向量的符号歧义。这种选择会严重降低位置特征的表达能力。

items.en: Numerical results for different positional encodings are reported in Table 13. For all results, we use the GatedGCN model (Bresson and Laurent, 2017). We study 5 types of positional encodings; EigVecs-k𝑘k corresponds to the smallest non-trivial k𝑘k eigenvectors, Rand sign(EigVecs) randomly flips the sign of the k𝑘k smallest non-trivial eigenvectors in each batch, Abs(EigVecs) takes the absolute value of the k𝑘k eigenvectors, Fixed node ordering uses the original node ordering of graphs, and Rand node ordering randomly permutes ordering of nodes in each batch. We observed that the best results are consistently produced with the Laplacian PEs with random sign flipping at training. For index PEs, randomly permuting the ordering of nodes also improves significantly the performances over keeping fixed the original node ordering. However, Laplacian PEs clearly outperform index PEs.
items.zh: 不同位置编码的数值结果见表 13。对于所有结果，我们使用 GatedGCN 模型（Bresson 和 Laurent，2017）。我们研究了 5 种类型的位置编码：EigVecs-k 对应最小的 k 个非平凡特征向量，Rand sign(EigVecs) 在每个批次中随机翻转 k 个最小非平凡特征向量的符号，Abs(EigVecs) 取 k 个特征向量的绝对值，固定节点顺序使用图的原始节点顺序，随机节点顺序在每个批次中随机排列节点顺序。我们观察到，最佳结果始终由训练时随机翻转符号的拉普拉斯 PE 产生。对于索引 PE，随机排列节点顺序也显著提高了性能，优于保持原始节点顺序。然而，拉普拉斯 PE 明显优于索引 PE。

full.sec: E.2 Edge representations for link prediction.
full.secZh: E.2 用于链接预测的边表示

items.en: The TSP and COLLAB edge classification tasks present an interesting empirical result for GCNs: Isotropic models (vanilla GCN, GraphSage) are consistently outperformed by their Anisotropic counterparts which use joint representations of adjacent nodes as edge features during aggregation (GAT, GatedGCN). items.en: In Table 14, we show the experiments of the three variants of GatedGCN and GAT on TSP and COLLAB. GatedGCN-E and GAT-E in Table are models using input edge features from the datasets to initialize the edge representations ei​jsubscript𝑒𝑖𝑗e_{ij}. As maintaining edge representations comes with a time and memory cost for the large COLLAB graph, all models use a reduced budget of 27K parameters to fit the GPU memory, and are allowed to train for a maximum of 24 hours for convergence.
items.zh: 在表14中，我们展示了GatedGCN和GAT三种变体在TSP和COLLAB上的实验。表中的GatedGCN-E和GAT-E是使用来自数据集的输入边特征初始化边表示e_{ij}的模型。由于维护边表示会带来时间和内存成本，对于大型COLLAB图，所有模型使用减少的27K参数预算以适应GPU内存，并允许训练最多24小时以达到收敛。

items.en: On both TSP and COLLAB, upgrading isotropic models with edge features significantly boosts performance given the same model parameters (e.g. 0.75 vs. 0.64 F1 score on TSP, 50.6% vs. 35.9% Hits@50 on COLLAB for GatedGCN with edge features vs. the isotropic variant). Maintaining explicit edge representations across layers further improves F1 score for TSP, especially when initializing the edge representations with euclidean distances between nodes (e.g. 0.78 vs. 0.67 F1 score for GAT-E vs. standard GAT). On COLLAB, adding explicit edge representations and inputs degrades performance, suggesting that the features (collaboration frequency and year) are not useful for the link prediction task (e.g. 47.2 vs. 51.5 Hits@50 for GatedGCN-E vs. GatedGCN). As suggested by Hu et al. (2020), it would be interesting to treat COLLAB as a multi-graph with temporal edges, motivating the development of task-specific anisotropic edge representations beyond generic attention and gating mechanisms.
items.zh: 在TSP和COLLAB上，给定相同模型参数，使用边特征升级各向同性模型显著提升了性能（例如，GatedGCN使用边特征与各向同性变体相比，TSP上F1分数0.75 vs. 0.64，COLLAB上Hits@50 50.6% vs. 35.9%）。跨层维护显式边表示进一步提高了TSP的F1分数，特别是当使用节点之间的欧几里得距离初始化边表示时（例如，GAT-E与标准GAT相比，F1分数0.78 vs. 0.67）。在COLLAB上，添加显式边表示和输入会降低性能，表明这些特征（合作频率和年份）对链接预测任务没有帮助（例如，GatedGCN-E与GatedGCN相比，Hits@50 47.2 vs. 51.5）。正如Hu等人（2020）所建议的，将COLLAB视为具有时间边的多图会很有趣，这激励了开发超越通用注意力和门控机制的任务特定各向异性边表示。

items.en: Interestingly, in Table 5 for COLLAB, we found that the isotropic GraphSage with max aggregation performs close to GAT and GatedGCN models, both of which perform anisotropic mean aggregation. On the other hand, models which use sum aggregation (GIN, MoNet) are unable to beat the simple matrix factorization baseline. This result indicates that aggregation functions which are invariant to node degree (max and mean) provide a powerful inductive bias for COLLAB.
items.zh: 有趣的是，在COLLAB的表5中，我们发现使用最大聚合的各向同性GraphSage性能接近GAT和GatedGCN模型，后两者执行各向异性平均聚合。另一方面，使用求和聚合的模型（GIN、MoNet）无法击败简单的矩阵分解基线。这一结果表明，对节点度数不变的聚合函数（最大和平均）为COLLAB提供了强大的归纳偏置。

items.en: We instantiate two anisotropic variants of GraphSage, as described in the following paragraphs, and compare them to GAT and GatedGCN on COLLAB in Table 15. We find that upgrading max aggregators with edge features does not significantly boost performance. On the other hand, maintaining explicit edge representations across layers hurts the models, presumably due to using very small hidden dimensions. (As previously mentioned, maintaining representations for both 235K nodes and 2.3M edges leads to significant GPU memory usage and requires using smaller hidden dimensions.)
items.zh: 我们实例化了GraphSage的两种各向异性变体，如下文所述，并在表15中与GAT和GatedGCN在COLLAB上进行比较。我们发现，使用边特征升级最大聚合器并没有显著提升性能。另一方面，跨层维护显式边表示会损害模型，可能是由于使用了非常小的隐藏维度。（如前所述，同时维护235K节点和2.3M边的表示会导致显著的GPU内存使用，并需要使用更小的隐藏维度。）

full.sec: Appendix F Experiments on TU datasets
full.secZh: 附录F 在TU数据集上的实验

items.en: Apart from the proposed datasets in our benchmark (Section C), we perform experiments on 3 TU datasets for graph classification – ENZYMES, DD and PROTEINS. Our goal is to empirically highlight some of the challenges of using these conventional datasets for benchmarking GNNs.
items.zh: 除了我们基准测试中提出的数据集（附录 C），我们还在 3 个 TU 数据集（ENZYMES、DD 和 PROTEINS）上进行了图分类实验。我们的目标是实证强调使用这些传统数据集对 GNN 进行基准测试的一些挑战。

items.en: Splitting. Since the 3 TU datasets that we use do not have standard splits, we perform a 10-fold cross validation split which gives 10 sets of train, validation and test data indices in the ratio 8:1:1:81:18:1:1. We use stratified sampling to ensure that the class distribution remains the same across splits. The indices are saved and used across all experiments for fair comparisons. There are 480480480 train/606060 validation/606060 test graphs for ENZYMES, 941941941 train/118118118 validation/119119119 test graphs for DD, and 889889889 train/112112112 validation/112112112 test graphs for PROTEINS datasets in each of the folds. Training. We use Adam optimizer with a similar learning rate strategy as used in our benchmark’s experimental protocol. An initial learning rate is tuned from a range of 1×10−31superscript1031\times 10^{-3} to 7×10−57superscript1057\times 10^{-5} using grid search for every GNN models. The learning rate reduce factor is 0.50.50.5, the patience value is 252525 and the stopping learning rate is 1×10−61superscript1061\times 10^{-6}. Performance Measure. We use classification accuracy between the predicted labels and groundtruth labels as our performance measure. The model performance is evaluated on the test split of the 10 folds for all TU datasets, and reported as the average and the standard deviation of the 10 scores.
items.zh: 划分。由于我们使用的 3 个 TU 数据集没有标准划分，我们采用 10 折交叉验证，得到 10 组训练、验证和测试数据索引，比例为 8:1:1。我们使用分层抽样确保各类别分布在各折中保持一致。索引被保存并在所有实验中用于公平比较。ENZYMES 每折有 480 个训练图、60 个验证图和 60 个测试图；DD 有 941 个训练图、118 个验证图和 119 个测试图；PROTEINS 有 889 个训练图、112 个验证图和 112 个测试图。训练。我们使用 Adam 优化器，学习率策略与基准测试实验协议相同。初始学习率在 1×10⁻³ 到 7×10⁻⁵ 范围内通过网格搜索为每个 GNN 模型调整。学习率衰减因子为 0.5，耐心值为 25，停止学习率为 1×10⁻⁶。性能度量。我们使用预测标签与真实标签之间的分类准确率作为性能度量。模型性能在所有 TU 数据集的 10 折测试集上评估，并报告 10 个分数的平均值和标准差。

items.en: Our numerical results on the TU datasets – ENZYMES, DD and PROTEINS are presented in Table 16. We observe all NNs have similar statistical test performance as the standard deviation is quite large. We also report a second run of these experiments with the same experimental protocol, i.e. the same 10-fold splitting and hyperparameters but different initialization (seed). We observe a change of model ranking, which we attribute to the small size of the datasets and the non-determinism of gradient descent optimizers. We also observe that, for DD and PROTEINS, the graph-agnostic MLP baselines perform as good as GNNs. Our observations reiterate how experiments on the small TU datasets are difficult to determine which GNNs are powerful and robust.
items.zh: 我们在 TU 数据集（ENZYMES、DD 和 PROTEINS）上的数值结果见表 16。我们观察到所有 NN 的统计测试性能相似，标准差较大。我们还报告了相同实验协议（即相同的 10 折划分和超参数但不同初始化种子）下的第二次运行结果。我们观察到模型排名发生变化，这归因于数据集规模小和梯度下降优化器的非确定性。我们还观察到，对于 DD 和 PROTEINS，与图无关的 MLP 基线表现与 GNN 一样好。我们的观察重申了在小型 TU 数据集上的实验难以确定哪些 GNN 强大且鲁棒。

full.sec: Appendix G A Note on Graph Size Normalization
full.secZh: 附录G 关于图大小归一化的说明

items.en: Intuitively, batching graphs of variable sizes may lead to node representation at different scales, making it difficult to learn the optimal statistics μ𝜇\mu and σ𝜎\sigma for BatchNorm across irregular batch sizes and variable graphs. A preliminary version of this work introduced a graph size normalization technique called GraphNorm, which normalizes the node features hiℓsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑖ℓh_{i}^{\ell} w.r.t. the graph size, i.e.,
items.zh: 直观上，对可变大小的图进行批处理可能导致节点表示处于不同尺度，使得 BatchNorm 难以在不规则批次大小和可变图之间学习最优统计量 μ 和 σ。本工作的初步版本引入了一种称为 GraphNorm 的图大小归一化技术，该技术相对于图大小对节点特征 hiℓ 进行归一化，即

items.en: where 𝒱𝒱\mathcal{V} is the number of graph nodes. The GraphNorm layer is placed before the BatchNorm layer.
items.zh: 其中 |V| 是图的节点数。GraphNorm 层放置在 BatchNorm 层之前。

items.en: We would like to note that GraphNorm does not have any concrete theoretical basis as of now, and was proposed based on initially promising empirical results on datasets such as ZINC and CLUSTER. Future work shall investigate more principled approaches towards designing normalization layers for graph structured data.
items.zh: 我们想指出，GraphNorm 目前没有具体的理论基础，而是基于在 ZINC 和 CLUSTER 等数据集上最初有希望的实证结果提出的。未来的工作应研究为图结构数据设计归一化层的更原则性方法。

full.sec: Appendix H Elaboration on Benchmarking Design Choices
full.secZh: 附录H 基准测试设计选择的详细说明

items.en: In Section 2, we provided a brief overview on the design choices that we had to make to build the proposed benchmarking framework. In particular, the decisions on the selection of the specific graph datasets that we have included in this framework, the necessity to constraint model parameters for comparison of GNNs’ performance, and whether a standard codebase with data, training, evaluation pipelines is required can be derived from several reasonings. In this section, we provide an elaborate discussion on these factors and how possible extensions can be developed in future with ease and as per required by a research agenda.
items.zh: 在第 2 节中，我们简要概述了构建所提议的基准测试框架时必须做出的设计选择。特别是，关于选择该框架中包含的特定图数据集、约束模型参数以比较 GNN 性能的必要性，以及是否需要标准代码库（包括数据、训练和评估流程）的决策，可以基于多种推理得出。在本节中，我们详细讨论这些因素，以及如何根据研究议程的需要，在未来轻松地进行可能的扩展。

items.en: Datasets. Our collection of datasets is based on medium-scale size and criteria of diversity in terms of the end-application domains, learning tasks at graph-, edge-, or node-levels, and their source of construction being real or mathematical. The medium-scale size of datasets enables quick prototyping of novel ideas and robust analysis could be generated in single experiments in as less as 12 hours of maximum time per experiment. Similarly, the diversity ensures a model can be tested on not just one end-application domain but a number of such domains. However, despite the best efforts, after any collection of datasets in such a research area where a general GNN architecture is expected to be robust to a variety of tasks and domains, there could always be need of additional datasets. Due to this necessity, the proposed framework can be extended with new datasets conveniently by any researchers adopting it. We have also observed the open-sourced GitHub repo of our framework being used accordingly with an example repo being https://github.com/karl-zhao/benchmarking-gnns-pyg (Zhao et al., 2020) which extends the framework with additional node classification datasets as well as adopts it in Pytorch Geometric (Fey and Lenssen, 2019) instead of DGL. Such adoption of our framework demonstrates its flexibility and the supported convenient extensions. We provide detailed instructions on adding new datasets to the framework in our GitHub repository’s README .
items.zh: 数据集。我们的数据集集合基于中等规模大小和多样性标准，包括最终应用领域、图级/边级/节点级学习任务，以及其构建来源是真实还是数学。中等规模的数据集能够快速原型化新想法，并在单次实验中（每次实验最多 12 小时）生成稳健分析。同样，多样性确保模型不仅可以在一个最终应用领域上测试，还可以在多个领域上测试。然而，尽管尽了最大努力，在这样一个期望通用 GNN 架构对各种任务和领域都鲁棒的研究领域中，收集任何数据集后，总可能还需要额外的数据集。由于这种必要性，所提议的框架可以通过任何采用它的研究人员方便地扩展新数据集。我们还观察到我们框架的开源 GitHub 仓库被相应使用，例如仓库 https://github.com/karl-zhao/benchmarking-gnns-pyg (Zhao et al., 2020) 扩展了框架，增加了节点分类数据集，并在 PyTorch Geometric (Fey and Lenssen, 2019) 中采用，而不是 DGL。这种对我们框架的采用展示了其灵活性和支持的便捷扩展。我们在 GitHub 仓库的 README 中提供了向框架添加新数据集的详细说明。

items.en: Parameter Budgets. As we have already mentioned, we designed the framework with the objective that it is used to conveniently ‘identify first principles’ in GNNs’ research and not drive a model towards achieving SOTA performance. To enforce this, a straightforward and sound choice is to constraint model parameters and fix it to a specific number (as eg. 100k and 500k) when comparing two or more GNNs. With this choice, we can likely rely on the inference that performance gains are coming from architectural designs and not merely large trainable parameters. The parameter budgeting also tells that the proposed framework may not be ideal to optimize a model to achieve SOTA by tuning hyperparameters, increasing model size to as much parameters as a server can fit, etc. However, we believe we condition the framework to be suitable for identifying performance trends and infer which first principles work robustly across different model experiments. Once such principles are identified, models can further be scaled without any constraints to achieve SOTA performance targeted benchmarks, beyond the datasets we included here.
items.zh: 参数预算。正如我们已经提到的，我们设计框架的目标是方便地“识别 GNN 研究中的首要原则”，而不是驱动模型达到 SOTA 性能。为了强制执行这一点，一个直接且合理的选择是约束模型参数并将其固定到特定数量（例如 100k 和 500k），当比较两个或多个 GNN 时。通过这一选择，我们可能可以依赖这样的推论：性能提升来自架构设计，而不仅仅是大的可训练参数。参数预算也表明，所提议的框架可能不适合通过调整超参数、增加模型大小到服务器能容纳的尽可能多的参数等来优化模型以达到 SOTA。然而，我们相信我们使框架适合识别性能趋势，并推断哪些首要原则在不同模型实验中鲁棒地工作。一旦识别出这些原则，模型可以进一步无约束地扩展，以在我们包含的数据集之外实现 SOTA 性能目标基准。

items.en: Codebase. A major contribution of this work is the release of the open-source coding infrastructure on GitHub. As observed since the first release in March 2020, the framework has been used extensively to develop new ideas in the field. In the existing literature prior to this work (Errica et al., 2019), it was a major issue that different research papers in this field adopted inconsistent model comparison methods. Our framework addresses this need of having a standard codebase that helps in training and evaluating GNNs on a collection of appropriate datasets with consistent settings. While a limiting perspective to such codebase can be that it restricts on the diverse choices which researchers often adopt in deep learning to fully realise the capabilities of a model, we understand that we have set out specific objectives of the need of the proposed coding infrastructure and any extensions with other training settings to the codebase can be done by augmenting methods or modules that applies to each model in a fair and consistent way.
items.zh: 代码库。这项工作的一个主要贡献是发布了 GitHub 上的开源编码基础设施。自 2020 年 3 月首次发布以来，该框架已被广泛用于开发该领域的新想法。在本工作之前的现有文献中 (Errica et al., 2019)，不同研究论文采用不一致的模型比较方法是一个主要问题。我们的框架解决了对标准代码库的需求，该代码库有助于在一致设置下对一组适当的数据集训练和评估 GNN。虽然对这种代码库的限制性观点可能是它限制了研究人员在深度学习中通常采用的多样化选择，以充分实现模型的能力，但我们理解我们设定了所提议编码基础设施的具体目标，任何其他训练设置的扩展都可以通过以公平一致的方式应用于每个模型的方法或模块来增强。

full.sec: Appendix I Hardware
full.secZh: 附录I 硬件

items.en: Timing research code can be tricky due to differences of implementations and hardware acceleration. Nonetheless, we take a practical view and report the average wall clock time per epoch and the total training time for each model. All experiments were implemented in DGL/PyTorch. We run experiments for MNIST, CIFAR10, ZINC, AQSOL, TSP, COLLAB, WikiCS, CSL, CYCLES, GraphTheoryProp and TUs on an Intel Xeon CPU E5-2690 v4 server with 4 Nvidia 1080Ti GPUs (11 GB), and for PATTERN and CLUSTER on an Intel Xeon Gold 6132 CPU with 4 Nvidia 2080Ti (11 GB) GPUs. Each experiment was run on a single GPU and 4 experiments were run on the server at any given time (on different GPUs). We run each experiment for a maximum of 12 hours.
items.zh: 由于实现和硬件加速的差异，对研究代码计时可能很棘手。尽管如此，我们采取实用观点，报告每个 epoch 的平均挂钟时间和每个模型的总训练时间。所有实验均在 DGL/PyTorch 中实现。我们在 Intel Xeon CPU E5-2690 v4 服务器（配备 4 块 Nvidia 1080Ti GPU，11 GB）上运行 MNIST、CIFAR10、ZINC、AQSOL、TSP、COLLAB、WikiCS、CSL、CYCLES、GraphTheoryProp 和 TU 的实验，在 Intel Xeon Gold 6132 CPU（配备 4 块 Nvidia 2080Ti GPU，11 GB）上运行 PATTERN 和 CLUSTER 的实验。每个实验在单个 GPU 上运行，服务器上同时运行 4 个实验（在不同 GPU 上）。每个实验最多运行 12 小时。

full.sec: Appendix J Memory Usage
full.secZh: 附录J 内存使用

items.en: For datasets that contain graphs with variable sizes, the memory consumed during training by the GPU device changes at each batch of graphs. We report in Figure 16 the GPU memory consumption during the training of GCN, GAT and GatedGCN on two datasets–ZINC and SBM-CLUSTER. The plots show the memory allocated during the model’s forward pass using a batch of graphs (128 graphs for ZINC and 64 for SBM-CLUSTER) and is computed by using PyTorch’s torch.cuda.memory_allocated(device) functionality. Overall, it can be observed that GatedGCN is a relatively higher memory-intensive model as compared with GCN and GAT, see Section B.1 for the respective models’ equations.
items.zh: 对于包含可变大小图的数据集，训练期间 GPU 设备消耗的内存随每个图批次变化。我们在图 16 中报告了 GCN、GAT 和 GatedGCN 在两个数据集（ZINC 和 SBM-CLUSTER）训练期间的 GPU 内存消耗。这些图显示了使用一批图（ZINC 为 128 个图，SBM-CLUSTER 为 64 个图）进行模型前向传播期间分配的内存，通过 PyTorch 的 torch.cuda.memory_allocated(device) 功能计算。总体而言，可以观察到 GatedGCN 是相对内存密集型的模型，与 GCN 和 GAT 相比，参见附录 B.1 中各模型的方程。
